each semester</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>9</p></td><td><p>8</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>備</p><p>註</p><p>Remarks</p></td><td colspan="8"><p>1.括弧內數字為學分數。Numbers in brackets mean credits.</p><p>2.「學期學分小計」指系必修科目學分數之合計。</p><p>“Credits each semester” means the amount of credits gained in department compulsory courses.   </p><p>3.「微積分、會計學、程式設計(一)、程式設計(二)、統計學、資料結構」等課程均需修「零學分的演習課」，其中「程式設計(一)、程式設計(二)」之演習課為2小時，其餘為1小時。</p><p> Drills required for students taking Calculus, Accounting, Programming (I) &amp; (II), Statistics, and Fundamental of Data Structures; 2-hour drill for Programming (I) &amp; (II), 1-hour drill for the others.</p><p>4.「專業實習/專題製作（一）、（二）」為本系終端學習課程，學生須於「專業實習/專題製作（二）」展現成果。</p><p>Vocational Training / Independent Study (I) &amp; (II) are the terminal courses of the department, of which students’ achievements must be shown in Vocational Training / Independent Study (II).</p><p>5.本系同學應修共同必修及通識課程共33學分、本系必修科目80學分、本系選修科目23學分，總共必須修滿136學分方可畢業。</p><p>Student of Dept. of IM are required to undertake University Compulsory and General Education courses (33), Department Compulsory courses (80), and Department Elective courses (23), making 136 credits in total for graduation.</p><p>6.本系必修、選修科目必須在系上修習方予承認，如有特殊原因需至外系修習者，需於選課時經系主任核准，其學分始得承認。</p><p>Department Compulsory and Elective courses must be undertaken within the department, if an individual needs to undertake any of them in other departments, the credits can be admitted only when it’s been approved by the Department Chair .</p><p>7.有關共同必修及通識教育科目之詳細規定，另依據「元智大學共同必修科目表」之規定辦理。</p><p>Please refer to Yuan Ze University Common Required Course List for General Education courses information and regulations.</p></td></tr></table>

For those who would like to registered “Fundamental computer programming”, he/she has to meet the college requirement. (Course Name: Fundamental Computer Programming)</p></td></tr><tr><td colspan="8"><p>「英語（一）」及「英語（二）」為基礎課程，共計二學期四學分。除了「英語（一）」及「英語（二）」外，應修習主題式英語課程三學期六學分，畢業前需修畢三個不同英語課程，始取得畢業資格。大一英語能力後測TOEIC模擬測驗成績未達350分者，應修習「應試加強班」，修習「應試加強班」期間之期末TOEIC模擬測驗成績未達350分者，則該科成績將「不及格」，並應再次修習「應試加強班」，直到取得TOEIC模擬測驗分數達350分(含)始得修習其他主題式英語課程。</p><p>English (I) and (II) are 4 credits elementary courses for the freshmen to complete within two semesters. Except English (I) and English (II), Students are required to obtain 6 credits from 3 different thematic courses before graduation. The “English Testing” course is provided to students who fail to score 350 in a TOEIC mock held in the end of their first academic year. They will need to take the exam again after the course and pass; otherwise, they will need to take another “English Testing” course next semester.</p><p>英語檢定English Testing（2）、經典五十Fifty Canonized Books（2）、服務學習Service Learning（1）</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>體育Physical Education（0）</p></td><td><p>體育Physical Education（0）</p></td><td><p>體育Physical Education（0）</p></td><td><p>體育Physical Education（0）</p></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td colspan="8"><p>體育除修習大一至大二4個學期外，另需通過「游泳能力檢定」及「心肺適能檢定」等二項檢測，列為畢業門檻。</p><p>Beside taking PE courses for 4 semesters (Year 1 to 2), students must pass both swimming and cardiopulmonary function tests.</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>通識教育科目</p><p>General Education</p><p>（10）</p></td><td colspan="8"><p>通識課程分為人文藝術﹑自然科學、社會科學及生命科學四大類。學生須於四領域中各選修兩學分課程，共計8學分，其餘2學分學生可自由選擇，由通識講座課程、微課自主學習或通識四大領域課程中選課。惟按所屬院（系）之不同，學生選修四大領域課程時需符合以下規定：The General Education program comprises four categories：Humanities, Natural Science, Social Science and Life Science. Students are required to take a two-credit course from each category to get eight credits before graduation. The rest two credits can be chosen from the General Education Lecture course, Micro Credit and Self-Study course or four categories upon their needs.However, there are rules and limitations set by each college for taking a course from the four categories：</p><table><tr><td><p>(系)院</p></td><td><p>選課規定</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>社政系、管院與資管系</p><p>Dept. of Social and Policy Sciences</p><p>College of Management</p><p>Dept. of Information Management</p></td><td><p>不得再選社會領域(GS)，須於自然(GN),生命(LS),人文藝術(LE)三領域中選課</p><p>General Education courses in the area of Social Science are not required; please select the courses among the areas of GN, LS and LE.</p></td></tr></table></td></tr><tr><td rowspan="4"><p>系</p><p>必</p><p>修</p><p>科</p><p>目</p><p>Department (I)</p><p>IM119</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>視窗程式設計</p><p>Windows Programming</p><p>IM227</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>管理學</p><p>Management IM106</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>程式設計(二)</p><p>Programming colspan="8"><p>1.括弧內數字為學分數。Numbers in brackets mean credits.</p><p>2.「學期學分小計」指系必修科目學分數之合計。</p><p>“Credits each semester” means the amount of credits gained in department compulsory courses.   </p><p>3.「微積分(一)、會計學、程式設計(一)、程式設計(二)、統計學(一)、統計學(二)、資料結構」等課程均需修「零學分的演習課」，其中「程式設計(一)、程式設計(二)」之演習課為2小時，其餘為1小時。</p><p> Drills required for students taking Calculus (I) &amp; (II), Accounting, Programming (I) &amp; (II), Statistics (I) &amp; (II), and Fundamental of Data Structures; 2-hour drill for Programming (I) &amp; (II), 1-hour drill for the others.</p><p>4.「專業實習/專題製作（一）、（二）」為本系終端學習課程，學生須於「專業實習/專題製作（二）」展現成果。</p><p>Vocational Training / Independent Study (I) &amp; (II) are the terminal courses of the department, of which students’ achievements must be shown in Vocational Training / Independent Study (II).</p><p>5. 本系同學應修共同必修及通識課程共33學分、本系必修科目80學分、其餘選修科目23學分（外系選修至多承認15學分，與他系合作之學程，依學程規定承認最高學分），總共必須修滿136學分方可畢業。</p><p>Student of Dept. of IM are required to undertake University Compulsory and General Education courses (33), Department Compulsory courses (80), and Elective courses (23), making 136 credits in total for graduation. (Outside the Department of elective up to recognize the (15) credits, and the cooperation courses with other departments, according to the provisions of the highest recognition of credit)</p><p>6. 本系必修科目必須在系上修習方予承認，如有特殊原因需至外系修習者，需於選課時經系主任核准，其學分始得承認。</p><p>Department Compulsory courses must be undertaken within the department, if an individual needs to undertake any of them in other departments, the credits can be admitted only when it’s been approved by the Department Chair .</p><p>7.有關共同必修及通識教育科目之詳細規定，另依據「元智大學共同必修科目表」之規定辦理。</p><p>Please refer to Yuan Ze University Common Required Course List for General Education courses information and regulations.</p><p>8.通識教育科目學分只採計至多10學分，超修之學分將不列入畢業學分。</p><p>  The maximum credits for general education courses is 10, the exceeding credits will not be counted.</p></td></tr></table>

**元智大學資訊管理學系 必修科目表**

**Department of Information Management at Yuan Ze University**

Passed by the 5th Academic Affairs Meeting, Academic Year 2016, on April 26, 2017

Amended by the 6th Academic Affairs Meeting, Academic Year 2016, on June 21, 2017

108.05.01一○七學年度第六次教務會議修訂通過

Amended by the 6th Academic Affairs Meeting, Academic Year 2018, on May 01, 2019

<table><tr><td rowspan="2"><p>    學年Academic Year</p><p>學期Semester</p><p>科目Subject</p></td><td colspan="2"><p>第一學年 1<sup>st</sup> Academic Year</p></td><td colspan="2"><p>第二學年  2<sup>nd</sup> Academic Year</p></td><td colspan="2"><p>第三學年 3<sup>rd</sup> Academic Year</p></td><td colspan="2"><p>第四學年 4<sup>th</sup> Academic Year</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>上 Fall</p></td><td><p>下Spring</p></td><td><p>上Fall</p></td><td><p>下Spring</p></td><td><p>上Fall</p></td><td><p>下Spring</p></td><td><p>上Fall</p></td><td><p>下Spring</p></td></tr><tr><td rowspan="7"><p>共</p><p>同</p><p>必</p><p>修</p><p>科</p><p>目</p><p>University Compulsory</p><p>（21）</p></td><td><p>國文（一）</p><p>Chinese (I)</p><p>（2）</p></td><td><p>國文（二）</p><p>Chinese (II)</p><p>（2）</p></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>英語（一）</p><p>English (I)</p><p>（2）</p></td><td><p>英語（二）</p><p>English (II)</p><p>（2）</p></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>基礎程式設計(一)</p><p>Fundamental Computer Programming(I)</p><p>（2）</p></td><td><p>基礎程式設計(二)</p><p>Fundamental Computer Programming(II)</p><p>（2）</p></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td colspan="8"><p>程式語言共4學分，依各院修課規則辦理。(開課名稱：基礎程式設計)</p><p>Fundamental Computer Programming is a four-credit course. For those who would like to registered “Fundamental computer programming”, he/she has to meet the college requirement. (Course Name: Fundamental Computer Programming)</p></td></tr><tr><td colspan="8"><p>外語課程應依「通識外語修課規定」修習，共計10學分。</p><ol><li>「英語（一）」及「英語（二）」為基礎課程，採能力分級上課，共計二學期四學分。</li><li>除了「英語（一）」及「英語（二）」外，應修習主題式英語課程三學期5學分，畢業前需修畢三個不同英語課程，始取得畢業資格。大一英語能力後測TOEIC模擬測驗成績未達350分者，應修習「應試加強班」，修習「應試加強班」期間之期末TOEIC模擬測驗成績未達350分者，則該科成績將「不及格」，並應再次修習「應試加強班」，直到取得TOEIC模擬測驗分數達350分(含)始得修習其他主題式英語課程。</li><li>另開設「英語檢定」計一學期1學分，「英語檢定」之修課限制與注意事項，請參照「英語檢定」修課規定，並由通識教學部公佈後施行。</li></ol><p>外國學生改修華語須經國際語言文化中心審核通過始可改修華語課程10學分，其華語課程10學分應含「華語檢定」1學分，「華語檢定」修課限制與注事意項，請參照「英語檢定」修課規定。</p><p>The undergraduate students must complete 10 required credits of foreign language courses as follows:</p><ul><li>English (I), (II): 4 credits</li><li>English thematic course: <strong>5</strong> credits </li><li>English Test: <strong>1</strong> credit</li></ul><p>English (I) and (II) are 4 credits elementary courses for the freshmen who are grouped on English competence-based to complete within two semesters.</p><p>English thematic courses are 5-credit of English courses; students are required to obtain </p><p>5 credits through 3 different thematic courses for graduation.</p><p>For the requirements of registering “English Testing”, please refer to "the Regulation for Registering English Test" announced and implemented by the College of General Education.</p><p>Foreign students need approval by ILCC for taking 10 credits of Mandarin Chinese courses as alternative courses of English.</p><p>英語檢定English Testing<strong>（1）</strong>、經典五十Fifty Canonized Books（2）、服務學習Service Learning（1）</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>體育Physical Education（0）</p></td><td><p>體育Physical Education（0）</p></td><td><p>體育Physical Education（0）</p></td><td><p>體育Physical Education（0）</p></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td colspan="8"><p>體育除修習大一至大二4個學期外，另需通過「游泳能力檢定」及「心肺適能檢定」等二項檢測，列為畢業門檻。</p><p>Beside taking PE courses for 4 semesters (Year 1 to 2), students must pass both swimming and cardiopulmonary function tests.</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>通識教育科目</p><p>General Education</p><p>（10）</p></td><td colspan="8"><p>通識課程分為人文藝術、自然科學、社會科學及生命科學四大類。學生須於四大領域中各選修2學分課程，共計8學分。General Education program comprises four categories：Humanities, Natural Science, Social Science and Life Science. Students are required to take a 2-credit course from each category to get 8 credits before graduation.</p><p>通識跨域課程General Education Interdisciplinary Course：此2學分學生可自由於通識講座課程、微課自主學習或在地多元文化課群中選課。惟外籍生與工程學院英語學士學位學程、資訊學院英語學士學位學程、人文社會學院英語學士學位學程、電機通訊學院英語學士學位學程學生仍須於四大領域中選課，依各院修課規定辦理。Students can select the 2 credits from a General Education Lecture course, Micro Credit courses, Self-Study courses, or Local-Multicultural courses. Only foreign students and undergraduates of International Programs in the Colleges of Engineering, Informatics, Humanities and Social Sciences, as well as Electrical and Communication Engineering are required to take a 2-credit course from the four categories according to each college’s policy before graduation.</p></td></tr><tr><td rowspan="4"><p>系</p><p>必</p><p>修</p><p>科</p><p>目</p><p>Department Compulsory</p><p>（80）</p></td><td><p>微積分(一)</p><p>Calculus(I)</p><p>IM127</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>微積分(二)</p><p>Calculus(II)</p><p>IM128</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>統計學(一)</p><p>Statistics(I) Programming IM226</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>財務管理</p><p>Financial Management IM313</p><p>（3）</p></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>學期</p><p>學分小計</p><p>Credit each semester</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>9</p></td><td><p>8</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>備</p><p>註</p><p>Remarks</p></td><td colspan="8"><p>1.括弧內數字為學分數。Numbers in brackets mean credits.</p><p>2.「學期學分小計」指系必修科目學分數之合計。</p><p>“Credits each semester” means the amount of credits gained in department compulsory courses.   </p><p>3.「微積分(一)、會計學、程式設計(一)、程式設計(二)、統計學(一)、統計學(二)、資料結構」等課程均需修「零學分的演習課」，其中「程式設計(一)、程式設計(二)」之演習課為2小時，其餘為1小時。</p><p> Drills required for students taking Calculus (I) &amp; (II), Accounting, Programming (I) &amp; (II), Statistics (I) &amp; (II), and Fundamental of Data Structures; 2-hour drill for Programming (I) &amp; (II), 1-hour drill for the others.</p><p>4.「專業實習/專題製作（一）、（二）」為本系終端學習課程，學生須於「專業實習/專題製作（二）」展現成果。</p><p>Vocational Training / Independent Study (I) &amp; (II) are the terminal courses of the department, of which students’ achievements must be shown in Vocational Training / Independent Study (II).</p><p>5.「專業實習/專題製作（一）」為本系必修「議題導向實作專題課程」3學分。 </p><p>Vocational Training / Independent Study (I) is a compulsory three-credit course of "Topic and Implementation-oriented courses".</p><p>6. 「程式設計(二)、網際網路程式設計、系統分析與設計、行動裝置程式設計、Python程式設計」為本系「數位應用相關課程｣，畢業前須修習至少2門「數位應用相關課程」(可至本系或外系修習)。</p><p>Programming (II), Internet Programming, System Analysis and Design, Mobile Device Programming, and Python Programming are courses of 'digital application courses'. Students require taking at least two 'digital application courses'. (Student may take 'digital application courses' from another department.)</p><p>7. 本系同學應修共同必修及通識課程共31學分、本系必修科目80學分、其餘選修科目23學分（外系選修至多承認17學分，與他系合作之學程，依學程規定承認最高學分），總共必須修滿134學分方可畢業。</p><p>Student of Dept. of IM are required to undertake University Compulsory and General Education courses (31), Department Compulsory courses (80), and Elective courses (25), making 136 credits in total for graduation. (Outside the Department of elective up to recognize the (<strong>17</strong>) credits, and the cooperation courses with other departments, according to the provisions of the highest recognition of credit)</p><p>8. 本系必修科目必須在系上修習方予承認，如有特殊原因需至外系修習者，需於選課時經系主任核准，其學分始得承認。</p><p>Department Compulsory courses must be undertaken within the department, if an individual needs to undertake any of them in other departments, the credits can be admitted only when it’s been approved by the Department Chair .</p><p>9.有關共同必修及通識教育科目之詳細規定，另依據「元智大學共同必修科目表」之規定辦理。</p><p>Please refer to Yuan Ze University Common Required Course List for General Education courses information and regulations.</p><p>10.通識教育科目學分只採計至多10學分，超修之學分將不列入畢業學分。</p><p>  The maximum credits for general education courses is 10, the exceeding credits will not be counted.</p></td></tr></table>

AA-CP-04-CF02 (1.3版)／102.04.19修訂

Passed by the 5th Academic Affairs Meeting, Academic Year 2016, on April 26, 2017

For those who would like to registered “Fundamental computer programming”, he/she has to meet the college requirement. (Course Name: Fundamental Computer Programming)</p></td></tr><tr><td colspan="8"><p>外語課程應依「通識外語修課規定」修習，共計10學分。</p><ol><li>「英語（一）」及「英語（二）」為基礎課程，採能力分級上課，共計二學期四學分。</li><li>除了「英語（一）」及「英語（二）」外，應修習主題式英語課程三學期5學分，畢業前需修畢三個不同英語課程，始取得畢業資格。大一英語能力後測TOEIC模擬測驗成績未達350分者，應修習「應試加強班」，修習「應試加強班」期間之期末TOEIC模擬測驗成績未達350分者，則該科成績將「不及格」，並應再次修習「應試加強班」，直到取得TOEIC模擬測驗分數達350分(含)始得修習其他主題式英語課程。</li><li>另開設「英語檢定」計一學期1學分，「英語檢定」之修課限制與注意事項，請參照「英語檢定」修課規定，並由通識教學部公佈後施行。</li></ol><p>外國學生改修華語須經國際語言文化中心審核通過始可改修華語課程10學分，其華語課程10學分應含「華語檢定」1學分，「華語檢定」修課限制與注意事項，請參照「英語檢定」修課規定。</p><p>凡本校大學部外國學生(不含交換生)修習「華語一」或「華語二」任一課程成績未達60分，不得修習「華語三」、「華語四」、「華語五」、「華語六」，若修習「華語三」、「華語四」任一課程成績未達60分，不得修習「華語五」或「華語檢定」。</p><p>The undergraduate students must complete 10 required credits of foreign language courses as follows:</p><ul><li>English (I), (II): 4 credits</li><li>English thematic course: 5 credits </li><li>English Test: 1 credit</li></ul><p>English (I) and (II) are 4 credits elementary courses for the freshmen who are grouped on English competence-based to complete within two semesters.</p><p>English thematic courses are 5-credit of English courses; students are required to obtain </p><p>5 credits through 3 different thematic courses for graduation.</p><p>For the requirements of registering “English Testing”, please refer to "the Regulation for Registering English Test" announced and implemented by the College of General Education.</p><p>Foreign students need approval by ILCC for taking 10 credits of Mandarin Chinese courses as alternative courses of English.</p><p>The undergraduate foreign students, exchange students excluded, must score 60 points or higher to pass Mandarin Chinese (I) and (II) before taking Mandarin Chinese (III), (IV), (V), and (VI). Students must score 60 points or higher in Mandarin Chinese (III) and (IV) before taking Mandarin Chinese (V) and (VI).</p><p>英語檢定English Testing（1）、經典五十Fifty Canonized Books（2）、服務學習Service Learning（1）</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>體育Physical Education（0）</p></td><td><p>體育Physical Education（0）</p></td><td><p>體育Physical Education（0）</p></td><td><p>體育Physical Education（0）</p></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td colspan="8"><p>體育除修習大一至大二4個學期外，另需通過「游泳能力檢定」及「心肺適能檢定」等二項檢測，列為畢業門檻。</p><p>Beside taking PE courses for 4 semesters (Year 1 to 2), students must pass both swimming and cardiopulmonary function tests.</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>通識教育科目</p><p>General Education</p><p>（10）</p></td><td colspan="8"><p>通識課程分為人文藝術、自然科學、社會科學及生命科學四大類。學生須於四大領域中各選修2學分課程，共計8學分。General Education program comprises four categories：Humanities, Natural Science, Social Science and Life Science. Students are required to take a 2-credit course from each category to get 8 credits before graduation.</p><p>通識跨域課程General Education Interdisciplinary Course：此2學分學生可自由於通識講座課程、微課自主學習或在地多元文化課群中選課。惟外籍生與工程學院英語學士班、資訊學院英語學士班、人文社會學院英語學士班、電機通訊學院英語學士班學生仍須於四大領域中選課，依各院修課規定辦理。Students can select the 2 credits from a General Education Lecture course, Micro Credit courses, Self-Study courses, or Local-Multicultural courses. Only foreign students and undergraduates of International Programs in the Colleges of Engineering, Informatics, Humanities and Social Sciences, as well as Electrical and Communication Engineering are required to take a 2-credit course from the four categories according to each college’s policy before graduation.</p></td></tr><tr><td rowspan="5"><p>系</p><p>必</p><p>修</p><p>科</p><p>目</p><p>Department Technology Management</p><p>IM332</p><p>（3）</p></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td><p>財務管理</p><p>Financial Management semester</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>13</p></td><td><p>9</p></td><td><p>7</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>備</p><p>註</p><p>Remarks</p></td><td colspan="8"><p>1.括弧內數字為學分數。Numbers in brackets mean credits.</p><p>2.「學期學分小計」指系必修科目學分數之合計。</p><p>“Credits each semester” means the amount of credits gained in department compulsory courses.   </p><p>3.「微積分(一)、會計學、程式設計(一)、程式設計(二)、統計學(一)、統計學(二)、資料結構」等課程均需修「零學分的演習課」，其中「程式設計(一)、程式設計(二)」之演習課為2小時，其餘為1小時。</p><p> Drills required for students taking Calculus (I) &amp; (II), Accounting, Programming (I) &amp; (II), Statistics (I) &amp; (II), and Fundamental of Data Structures; 2-hour drill for Programming (I) &amp; (II), 1-hour drill for the others.</p><p>4.「專業實習/專題製作（一）、（二）」為本系終端學習課程，學生須於「專業實習/專題製作（二）」展現成果。</p><p>Vocational Training / Independent Study (I) &amp; (II) are the terminal courses of the department, of which students’ achievements must be shown in Vocational Training / Independent Study (II).</p><p>5.「專業實習/專題製作（一）」為本系必修「議題導向實作專題課程」3學分。 </p><p>Vocational Training / Independent Study (I) is a compulsory three-credit course of "Topic and Implementation-oriented courses".</p><p>6. 「程式設計(二)、網際網路程式設計、系統分析與設計、行動裝置程式設計、Python程式設計」為本系「數位應用相關課程｣，畢業前須修習至少2門「數位應用相關課程」(可至本系或外系修習)。</p><p>Programming (II), Internet Programming, System Analysis and Design, Mobile Device Programming, and Python Programming are courses of 'digital application courses'. Students require taking at least two 'digital application courses'. (Student may take 'digital application courses' from another department.)</p><p>7. 本系同學應修共同必修及通識課程共31學分、本系必修科目80學分、其餘選修科目23學分（外系選修至多承認17學分，與他系合作之學程，依學程規定承認最高學分），總共必須修滿134學分方可畢業。</p><p>Student of Dept. of IM are required to undertake University Compulsory and General Education courses (31), Department Compulsory courses (80), and Elective courses (23), making 134 credits in total for graduation. (Outside the Department of elective up to recognize the (17) credits, and the cooperation courses with other departments, according to the provisions of the highest recognition of credit)</p><p>8. 本系必修科目必須在系上修習方予承認，如有特殊原因需至外系修習者，需於選課時經系主任核准，其學分始得承認。</p><p>Department Compulsory courses must be undertaken within the department, if an individual needs to undertake any of them in other departments, the credits can be admitted only when it’s been approved by the Department Chair .</p><p>9.有關共同必修及通識教育科目之詳細規定，另依據「元智大學共同必修科目表」之規定辦理。</p><p>Please refer to Yuan Ze University Common Required Course List for General Education courses information and regulations.</p><p>10.通識教育科目學分只採計至多10學分，超修之學分將不列入畢業學分。</p><p>  The maximum credits for general education courses is 10, the exceeding credits will not be counted.</p></td></tr></table>

**Department of Information Management at Yuan Ze University**

**List of Required Courses**

**（112學年度入學新生適用）**

**(Applicable to Students Admitted in Academic Year of 2023)**

112.04.19一一一學年度第六次教務會議通過

Passed by the 6th Academic Affairs Meeting, Academic Year 2022, on April 19, 2023

114.11.12 一一四學年度第三次教務會議修訂通過

Amended by the 3rd Academic Affairs Meeting, Academic Year 2025, on November 12, 2025

<table><tr><td rowspan="2"><p>    學年Academic Year</p><p>學期Semester</p><p>科目Subject</p></td><td colspan="2"><p>第一學年 1<sup>st</sup> Academic Year</p></td><td colspan="2"><p>第二學年  2<sup>nd</sup> Academic Year</p></td><td colspan="2"><p>第三學年 3<sup>rd</sup> Academic Year</p></td><td colspan="2"><p>第四學年 4<sup>th</sup> Academic Year</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>上 Fall</p></td><td><p>下Spring</p></td><td><p>上Fall</p></td><td><p>下Spring</p></td><td><p>上Fall</p></td><td><p>下Spring</p></td><td><p>上Fall</p></td><td><p>下Spring</p></td></tr><tr><td rowspan="5"><p>共</p><p>同</p><p>必</p><p>修</p><p>科</p><p>目</p><p>Common Compulsory</p><p>（17）</p></td><td><p>國文（一）</p><p>Chinese (I)</p><p>（2）</p></td><td><p>國文（二）</p><p>Chinese (II)</p><p>（2）</p></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>英語（一）</p><p>English (I)</p><p>（2）</p></td><td><p>英語（二）</p><p>English (II)</p><p>（2）</p></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td colspan="8"><p>外語課程應修習10學分。</p><ol><li>「英語（一）」及「英語（二）」為基礎課程，採能力分級上課，共計二學期四學分。</li><li>除了「英語（一）」及「英語（二）」外，畢業前應修畢三個不同主題式英語課程，共三學期5學分。</li><li>大一英語能力後測「TOEIC模擬測驗」成績未達350分者，應修習「應試加強班」(EL260)。修習「應試加強班」期間之期末TOEIC模擬測驗成績未達350分者，則該科成績將「不及格」，並應再次修習「應試加強班」，直到取得TOEIC模擬測驗分數達350分(含)始得修習其他主題式英語課程。</li><li>另開設「英語檢定」(EL360)計一學期1學分，「英語檢定」之修課限制與注意事項，請參照「通識外語『英語檢定』修課規定」，並由通識教學部公佈後施行。</li></ol><p>外國學生改修華語須經國際語言文化中心審核通過始可改修華語課程10學分，其華語課程10學分應含「華語檢定」1學分，「華語檢定」修課限制與注意事項，請參照「通識外語『英語檢定』修課規定」。</p><p>凡本校大學部外國學生修習「華語(一)」或「華語(二)」任一課程成績未達60分，不得修習「華語(三)」、「華語(四)」。若修習「華語(三)」、「華語(四)」任一課程成績未達60分，不得修習「華語(五)」或「華語檢定」(EL372)。</p><p>The undergraduate students must complete 10 required credits of foreign language courses.</p><ol><li>English (I) &amp; (II) for the total 4 credits: English (I) and (II) are 4 credit elementary courses for the freshmen who are grouped on English competence; to complete within two semesters.</li><li>English thematic course for the total 5 credits: English thematic courses are 5-credit English courses; students are required to obtain 5 credits through 3 different thematic courses for graduation. </li><li>Students who do not reach the 350-point threshold of TOEIC Mock Exam in the end of the freshman year must take “English Testing” (EL260) course. Students will fail the course if they do not score higher than 350 points in TOEIC Mock Exam by the end of the course, and must repeatedly take the course until they can score higher than 350 points. </li><li>“English Testing” (EL360) for the total 1 credit: For the requirements of registering “English Testing”, please refer to "the Regulation for Registering English Test" announced and implemented by the College of General Education.</li></ol><p>Foreign students need approval by ILCC for taking 10 credits of Mandarin Chinese courses as alternative courses of English.</p><p>The undergraduate foreign students must pass Mandarin Chinese (I) and (II) before taking Mandarin Chinese (III) and (IV). Students must pass Mandarin Chinese (III) and (IV) before taking Mandarin Chinese (V) and Chinese Proficiency Test (EL372).</p><p>英語檢定English Testing（1）、經典選讀A Guide to Classics（2）、服務學習Service Learning（1）</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>體育Physical Education（0）</p></td><td><p>體育Physical Education（0）</p></td><td><p>興趣選項體育optional physical education（0）</p></td><td><p>興趣選項體育optional physical education（0）</p></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td colspan="8"><p>大學部必須修習4學期體育課程；其中2學期為大一體育課程原班級上課，另2學期為興趣選項體育課程。</p><p>The undergraduate students must attend the physical education course for 4 semesters; 2 semesters for the freshman physical education courses, the other two semesters for the optional physical education courses.</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>通識教育科目</p><p>General Education</p><p>（10）</p></td><td colspan="8"><p>通識課程分為人文藝術、自然科學、社會科學及生命科學四大類。學生須於四大領域中各選修2學分課程，共計8學分。General Education program comprises four categories：Humanities, Natural Science, Social Science and Life Science. Students are required to take a 2-credit course from each category to get 8 credits before graduation.</p><p>通識跨域課程General Education Interdisciplinary Course：此2學分學生可自由於通識講座課程、微課自主學習或在地多元文化課群中選課。惟外籍生與工程學院英語學士班、資訊學院英語學士班、人文社會學院英語學士班、電機通訊學院英語學士班學生仍須於四大領域中選課，依各院修課規定辦理。Students can select the 2 credits from a General Education Lecture course, Micro Credit courses, Self-Study courses, or Local-Multicultural courses. Only foreign students and undergraduates of International Programs in the Colleges of Engineering, Informatics, Humanities and Social Sciences, as well as Electrical and Communication Engineering are required to take a 2-credit course from the four categories according to each college’s policy before graduation.</p></td></tr><tr><td (II)</p><p>IM120</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>企業概論</p><p>Introduction to Business</p><p>IM242</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p><a></a>網際網路</p><p>程式設計</p><p>Internet Programming IM226</p><p>（3）</p></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>學期</p><p>學分小計</p><p>Credit each semester</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>7</p></td><td><p>6</p></td><td><p>6</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>備</p><p>註</p><p>Remarks</p></td><td colspan="8"><p>1.括弧內數字為學分數。Numbers in brackets mean credits.</p><p>2.「學期學分小計」指系必修科目學分數之合計。</p><p>“Credits each semester” means the amount of credits gained in department compulsory courses. </p><p>3.「微積分(一)、會計學、程式設計(一)、程式設計(二)、統計學(一)、統計學(二)、資料結構」等課程均需修「零學分的演習課」，其中「程式設計(一)、程式設計(二)」之演習課為2小時，其餘為1小時。</p><p> Drills required for students taking Calculus (I) &amp; (II), Accounting, Programming (I) &amp; (II), Statistics (I) &amp; (II), and Fundamental of Data Structures; 2-hour drill for Programming (I) &amp; (II), 1-hour drill for the others.</p><p>4.專業實習與專題製作兩系列課程至少須選修一系列之所有課程：</p><p>(1)專業實習（校外）共計四門課，包括專業實習（一）、專業實習（二）、專業實習（三）與專業實習（四）。</p><p>(2)專題製作（校內）共計兩門課，包括專題製作（一）與專題製作（二）。</p><p>Students must choose between two tracks, Vocational Training or Field Study, as well as the series of courses corresponding to each track:</p><p>(1)Vocational Training (off-campus) is composed of 4 courses: Vocational Training (I), (II) , (III), and (IV).</p><p>(2)Field Study (on-campus) is composed of two courses, including Field Study (I) and (II).</p><p>5.「專業實習(一)、專題製作(一)、專業實習(三)、專題製作(二)」為本系必修終端學習課程，學生須於「專業實習(三)、專題製作(二)」展現成果。</p><p>Vocational Training (Ⅰ)、Field Study (I)、Vocational Training (III)、Field Study (II) are the compulsory terminal courses of the department, of which students’ achievements must be shown in Vocational Training (III)、Field Study (II).</p><p>6.「專業實習(一)、專題製作(一)」為本系「議題導向實作專題課程」3學分。 </p><p>Vocational Training (Ⅰ)、Field Study (I) is a three-credit course of "Topic and Implementation-oriented courses".</p><p>7.「程式設計(二)、網際網路程式設計、系統分析與設計、行動裝置程式設計、Python程式設計」為本系「數位應用相關課程｣，畢業前須修習至少2門「數位應用相關課程」(可至本系或外系修習)。</p><p>Programming (II), Internet Programming, System Analysis and Design, Mobile Device Programming, and Python Programming are courses of 'digital application courses'. Students require taking at least two 'digital application courses'. (Student may take 'digital application courses' from another department.)</p><p>8. 本系同學總共必須修滿 128學分方可畢業，包括共同必修及通識課程共27學分、院必修程式語言課程共4學分、本系必修科目70學分、其餘選修科目27學分（外系選修至多承認17學分，與他系合作之學程，依學程規定承認最高學分）。</p><p>Student of Dept. of IM must take 128 credits in total for graduation, include Required Common Courses and General Education courses (27) credits , College Compulsory Courses Fundamental Computer Programming (4) credits , Department Compulsory courses (70) credits, and Department Elective courses (27) credits. (Outside the Department of elective up to recognize the (17) credits, and the cooperation courses with other departments, according to the provisions of the highest recognition of credit)</p><p>9.本系必修科目必須在系上修習方予承認，如有特殊原因需至外系修習者，需於選課時經系主任核准，其學分始得承認。</p><p>Department Compulsory courses must be undertaken within the department, if an individual needs to undertake any of them in other departments, the credits can be admitted only when it’s been approved by the Department Chair .</p><p>10.有關共同必修及通識教育科目之詳細規定，另依據「元智大學共同必修科目表」之規定辦理。</p><p>Please refer to Yuan Ze University Common Required Course List for General Education courses information and regulations.</p><p>11.通識教育科目學分只採計至多10學分，超修之學分將不列入畢業學分。</p><p>  The maximum credits for general education courses is 10, the exceeding credits will not be counted.</p><p>12.為增進學生英文能力，鼓勵選修英語授課課程(含英專班)，其修習之課程科目及學分數之認抵需依學系規定辦理。</p><p>To improve students’ English, we encourage students to take the courses in English (including English Bachelor), which courses and credits waiver and transference should be standardized by each department. </p><p>13.自106學年度起軍訓課程由必修改為選修，該學分納入當學期修課學分數計算，但不納入畢業總學分計算。</p><p>The military education courses are no longer compulsory starting the 106 academic year. The military education courses will not be accumulated to the graduation requirements, but they can be counted as taken credits for each semester.</p></td></tr></table>

AA-CP-04-CF02 (1.3版)／102.04.19修訂

112.04.19 一一一學年度第六次教務會議修訂通過

Amended by the 6th Academic Affairs Meeting, Academic Year 2022, on April 19, 2023

<table><tr><td rowspan="2"><p>    學年Academic Year</p><p>學期Semester</p><p>科目Subject</p></td><td colspan="2"><p>第一學年 1<sup>st</sup> Academic Year</p></td><td colspan="2"><p>第二學年  2<sup>nd</sup> Academic Year</p></td><td colspan="2"><p>第三學年 3<sup>rd</sup> Academic Year</p></td><td colspan="2"><p>第四學年 4<sup>th</sup> Academic Year</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>上 Fall</p></td><td><p>下Spring</p></td><td><p>上Fall</p></td><td><p>下Spring</p></td><td><p>上Fall</p></td><td><p>下Spring</p></td><td><p>上Fall</p></td><td><p>下Spring</p></td></tr><tr><td rowspan="7"><p>共</p><p>同</p><p>必</p><p>修</p><p>科</p><p>目</p><p>University Compulsory</p><p>（21）</p></td><td><p>國文（一）</p><p>Chinese (I)</p><p>（2）</p></td><td><p>國文（二）</p><p>Chinese (II)</p><p>（2）</p></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>英語（一）</p><p>English (I)</p><p>（2）</p></td><td><p>英語（二）</p><p>English (II)</p><p>（2）</p></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>基礎程式設計(一)</p><p>Fundamental Computer Programming(I)</p><p>（2）</p></td><td><p>基礎程式設計(二)</p><p>Fundamental Computer Programming(II)</p><p>（2）</p></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td colspan="8"><p>程式語言共4學分，依各院修課規則辦理。(開課名稱：基礎程式設計)</p><p>Fundamental Computer Programming is a four-credit course. For those who would like to registered “Fundamental computer programming”, he/she has to meet the college requirement. (Course Name: Fundamental Computer Programming)</p></td></tr><tr><td colspan="8"><p>外語課程應依「通識外語修課規定」修習，共計10學分。</p><ol><li>「英語（一）」及「英語（二）」為基礎課程，採能力分級上課，共計二學期四學分。</li><li>除了「英語（一）」及「英語（二）」外，應修習主題式英語課程三學期5學分，畢業前需修畢三個不同英語課程，始取得畢業資格。大一英語能力後測TOEIC模擬測驗成績未達350分者，應修習「應試加強班」，修習「應試加強班」期間之期末TOEIC模擬測驗成績未達350分者，則該科成績將「不及格」，並應再次修習「應試加強班」，直到取得TOEIC模擬測驗分數達350分(含)始得修習其他主題式英語課程。</li><li>另開設「英語檢定」計一學期1學分，「英語檢定」之修課限制與注意事項，請參照「英語檢定」修課規定，並由通識教學部公佈後施行。</li></ol><p>外國學生改修華語須經國際語言文化中心審核通過始可改修華語課程10學分，其華語課程10學分應含「華語檢定」1學分，「華語檢定」修課限制與注意事項，請參照「英語檢定」修課規定。</p><p>凡本校大學部外國學生(不含交換生)修習「華語一」或「華語二」任一課程成績未達60分，不得修習「華語三」、「華語四」、「華語五」、「華語六」，若修習「華語三」、「華語四」任一課程成績未達60分，不得修習「華語五」或「華語檢定」。</p><p>The undergraduate students must complete 10 required credits of foreign language courses as follows:</p><ul><li>English (I), (II): 4 credits</li><li>English thematic course: 5 credits </li><li>English Test: 1 credit</li></ul><p>English (I) and (II) are 4 credits elementary courses for the freshmen who are grouped on English competence-based to complete within two semesters.</p><p>English thematic courses are 5-credit of English courses; students are required to obtain </p><p>5 credits through 3 different thematic courses for graduation.</p><p>For the requirements of registering “English Testing”, please refer to "the Regulation for Registering English Test" announced and implemented by the College of General Education.</p><p>Foreign students need approval by ILCC for taking 10 credits of Mandarin Chinese courses as alternative courses of English.</p><p>The undergraduate foreign students, exchange students excluded, must score 60 points or higher to pass Mandarin Chinese (I) and (II) before taking Mandarin Chinese (III), (IV), (V), and (VI). Students must score 60 points or higher in Mandarin Chinese (III) and (IV) before taking Mandarin Chinese (V) and (VI).</p><p>英語檢定English Testing（1）、經典五十Fifty Canonized Books（2）、服務學習Service Learning（1）</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>體育Physical Education（0）</p></td><td><p>體育Physical Education（0）</p></td><td><p>興趣選項體育optional physical education（0）</p></td><td><p>興趣選項體育optional physical education（0）</p></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td colspan="8"><p>大學部必須修習4學期體育課程；其中2學期為大一體育課程原班級上課，另2學期為興趣選項體育課程，另需通過「游泳能力檢定」及「心肺適能檢定」等二項檢測，列為畢業門檻。</p><p>The undergraduate students must attend the physical education course for 4 semesters; 2 semesters for the freshman physical education courses, the other two semesters for the optional physical education courses, students must pass both swimming and cardiopulmonary function tests.</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>通識教育科目</p><p>General Education</p><p>（10）</p></td><td colspan="8"><p>通識課程分為人文藝術、自然科學、社會科學及生命科學四大類。學生須於四大領域中各選修2學分課程，共計8學分。General Education program comprises four categories：Humanities, Natural Science, Social Science and Life Science. Students are required to take a 2-credit course from each category to get 8 credits before graduation.</p><p>通識跨域課程General Education Interdisciplinary Course：此2學分學生可自由於通識講座課程、微課自主學習或在地多元文化課群中選課。惟外籍生與工程學院英語學士班、資訊學院英語學士班、人文社會學院英語學士班、電機通訊學院英語學士班學生仍須於四大領域中選課，依各院修課規定辦理。Students can select the 2 credits from a General Education Lecture course, Micro Credit courses, Self-Study courses, or Local-Multicultural courses. Only foreign students and undergraduates of International Programs in the Colleges of Engineering, Informatics, Humanities and Social Sciences, as well as Electrical and Communication Engineering are required to take a 2-credit course from the four categories according to each college’s policy before graduation.</p></td></tr><tr><td rowspan="4"><p>系</p><p>必</p><p>修</p><p>科</p><p>目</p><p>Department semester</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>10</p></td><td><p>6</p></td><td><p>6</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>備</p><p>註</p><p>Remarks</p></td><td colspan="8"><p>1.括弧內數字為學分數。Numbers in brackets mean credits.</p><p>2.「學期學分小計」指系必修科目學分數之合計。</p><p>“Credits each semester” means the amount of credits gained in department compulsory courses.   </p><p>3.「微積分(一)、會計學、程式設計(一)、程式設計(二)、統計學(一)、統計學(二)、資料結構」等課程均需修「零學分的演習課」，其中「程式設計(一)、程式設計(二)」之演習課為2小時，其餘為1小時。</p><p> Drills required for students taking Calculus (I) &amp; (II), Accounting, Programming (I) &amp; (II), Statistics (I) &amp; (II), and Fundamental of Data Structures; 2-hour drill for Programming (I) &amp; (II), 1-hour drill for the others.</p><p>4.專業實習與專題製作兩系列課程至少須選修一系列之所有課程：</p><p>(1)專業實習（校外）共計四門課，包括專業實習（一）、專業實習（二）、專業實習（三）與專業實習（四）。</p><p>(2)專題製作（校內）共計兩門課，包括專題製作（一）與專題製作（二）。</p><p>Students must choose between two tracks, Vocational Training or Field Study, as well as the series of courses corresponding to each track:</p><p>(1)Vocational Training (off-campus) is composed of 4 courses: Vocational Training I, II, III, and IV.</p><p>(2)Field Study (on-campus) is composed of two courses, including Field Study I and II.</p><p>5.「專業實習(一)、專題製作(一)、專業實習(三)、專題製作(二)」為本系終端學習課程，學生須於「專業實習(三)、專題製作(二)」展現成果。</p><p>Vocational Training (Ⅰ)、Field Study (I)、Vocational Training (III)、Field Study (II) are the terminal courses of the department, of which students’ achievements must be shown in Vocational Training (III)、Field Study (II).</p><p>6.「專業實習(一)、專題製作(一)」為本系必修「議題導向實作專題課程」3學分。 </p><p>Vocational Training (Ⅰ)、Field Study (I) is a compulsory three-credit course of "Topic and Implementation-oriented courses".</p><p>7. 「程式設計(二)、網際網路程式設計、系統分析與設計、行動裝置程式設計、Python程式設計」為本系「數位應用相關課程｣，畢業前須修習至少2門「數位應用相關課程」(可至本系或外系修習)。</p><p>Programming (II), Internet Programming, System Analysis and Design, Mobile Device Programming, and Python Programming are courses of 'digital application courses'. Students require taking at least two 'digital application courses'. (Student may take 'digital application courses' from another department.)</p><p>8. 本系同學應修共同必修及通識課程共31學分、本系必修科目73學分、其餘選修科目24學分（外系選修至多承認17學分，與他系合作之學程，依學程規定承認最高學分），總共必須修滿128學分方可畢業。</p><p>Student of Dept. of IM are required to undertake University Compulsory and General Education courses (31), Department Compulsory courses (73), and Elective courses (24), making 128 credits in total for graduation. (Outside the Department of elective up to recognize the (17) credits, and the cooperation courses with other departments, according to the provisions of the highest recognition of credit)</p><p>9. 本系必修科目必須在系上修習方予承認，如有特殊原因需至外系修習者，需於選課時經系主任核准，其學分始得承認。</p><p>Department Compulsory courses must be undertaken within the department, if an individual needs to undertake any of them in other departments, the credits can be admitted only when it’s been approved by the Department Chair.</p><p>10.有關共同必修及通識教育科目之詳細規定，另依據「元智大學共同必修科目表」之規定辦理。</p><p>Please refer to Yuan Ze University Common Required Course List for General Education courses information and regulations.</p><p>11.通識教育科目學分只採計至多10學分，超修之學分將不列入畢業學分。</p><p>  The maximum credits for general education courses is 10, the exceeding credits will not be counted.</p><p>12.為增進學生英文能力，鼓勵選修英語授課課程(含英專班)，其修習之課程科目及學分數之認抵需依學系規定辦理。</p><p>To improve students’ English, we encourage students to take the courses in English (including English Bachelor), which courses and credits waiver and transference should be standardized by each department. </p></td></tr></table>

For those who would like to registered “Fundamental computer programming”, he/she has to meet the college requirement. (Course Name: Fundamental Computer Programming)</p></td></tr><tr><td colspan="8"><p>外語課程應修習10學分。</p><ol><li>「英語（一）」及「英語（二）」為基礎課程，採能力分級上課，共計二學期四學分。</li><li>除了「英語（一）」及「英語（二）」外，畢業前應修畢三個不同主題式英語課程，共三學期5學分。</li><li>大一英語能力後測「TOEIC模擬測驗」成績未達350分者，應修習「應試加強班」(EL260)。修習「應試加強班」期間之期末TOEIC模擬測驗成績未達350分者，則該科成績將「不及格」，並應再次修習「應試加強班」，直到取得TOEIC模擬測驗分數達350分(含)始得修習其他主題式英語課程。</li><li>另開設「英語檢定」(EL360)計一學期1學分，「英語檢定」之修課限制與注意事項，請參照「通識外語『英語檢定』修課規定」，並由通識教學部公佈後施行。</li></ol><p>外國學生改修華語須經國際語言文化中心審核通過始可改修華語課程10學分，其華語課程10學分應含「華語檢定」1學分，「華語檢定」修課限制與注意事項，請參照「通識外語『英語檢定』修課規定」。</p><p>凡本校大學部外國學生修習「華語(一)」或「華語(二)」任一課程成績未達60分，不得修習「華語(三)」、「華語(四)」。若修習「華語(三)」、「華語(四)」任一課程成績未達60分，不得修習「華語(五)」或「華語檢定」(EL372)。</p><p>The undergraduate students must complete 10 required credits of foreign language courses.</p><ol><li>English (I) &amp; (II) for the total 4 credits: English (I) and (II) are 4 credit elementary courses for the freshmen who are grouped on English competence; to complete within two semesters.</li><li>English thematic course for the total 5 credits: English thematic courses are 5-credit English courses; students are required to obtain 5 credits through 3 different thematic courses for graduation. </li><li>Students who do not reach the 350-point threshold of TOEIC Mock Exam in the end of the freshman year must take “English Testing” (EL260) course. Students will fail the course if they do not score higher than 350 points in TOEIC Mock Exam by the end of the course, and must repeatedly take the course until they can score higher than 350 points. </li><li>“English Testing” (EL360) for the total 1 credit: For the requirements of registering “English Testing”, please refer to "the Regulation for Registering English Test" announced and implemented by the College of General Education.</li></ol><p>Foreign students need approval by ILCC for taking 10 credits of Mandarin Chinese courses as alternative courses of English.</p><p>The undergraduate foreign students must pass Mandarin Chinese (I) and (II) before taking Mandarin Chinese (III) and (IV). Students must pass Mandarin Chinese (III) and (IV) before taking Mandarin Chinese (V) and Chinese Proficiency Test (EL372).</p><p>英語檢定English Testing（1）、經典五十Fifty Canonized Books（2）、服務學習Service Learning（1）</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>體育Physical Education（0）</p></td><td><p>體育Physical Education（0）</p></td><td><p>興趣選項體育optional physical education（0）</p></td><td><p>興趣選項體育optional physical education（0）</p></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td colspan="8"><p>大學部必須修習4學期體育課程；其中2學期為大一體育課程原班級上課，另2學期為興趣選項體育課程。</p><p>The undergraduate students must attend the physical education course for 4 semesters; 2 semesters for the freshman physical education courses, the other two semesters for the optional physical education courses.</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>通識教育科目</p><p>General Education</p><p>（10）</p></td><td colspan="8"><p>通識課程分為人文藝術、自然科學、社會科學及生命科學四大類。學生須於四大領域中各選修2學分課程，共計8學分。General Education program comprises four categories：Humanities, Natural Science, Social Science and Life Science. Students are required to take a 2-credit course from each category to get 8 credits before graduation.</p><p>通識跨域課程General Education Interdisciplinary Course：此2學分學生可自由於通識講座課程、微課自主學習或在地多元文化課群中選課。惟外籍生與工程學院英語學士班、資訊學院英語學士班、人文社會學院英語學士班、電機通訊學院英語學士班學生仍須於四大領域中選課，依各院修課規定辦理。Students can select the 2 credits from a General Education Lecture course, Micro Credit courses, Self-Study courses, or Local-Multicultural courses. Only foreign students and undergraduates of International Programs in the Colleges of Engineering, Informatics, Humanities and Social Sciences, as well as Electrical and Communication Engineering are required to take a 2-credit course from the four categories according to each college’s policy before graduation.</p></td></tr><tr><td rowspan="4"><p>系</p><p>必</p><p>修</p><p>科</p><p>目</p><p>Department semester</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>10</p></td><td><p>6</p></td><td><p>6</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>備</p><p>註</p><p>Remarks</p></td><td colspan="8"><p>1.括弧內數字為學分數。Numbers in brackets mean credits.</p><p>2.「學期學分小計」指系必修科目學分數之合計。</p><p>“Credits each semester” means the amount of credits gained in department compulsory courses.   </p><p>3.「微積分(一)、會計學、程式設計(一)、程式設計(二)、統計學(一)、統計學(二)、資料結構」等課程均需修「零學分的演習課」，其中「程式設計(一)、程式設計(二)」之演習課為2小時，其餘為1小時。</p><p> Drills required for students taking Calculus (I) &amp; (II), Accounting, Programming (I) &amp; (II), Statistics (I) &amp; (II), and Fundamental of Data Structures; 2-hour drill for Programming (I) &amp; (II), 1-hour drill for the others.</p><p>4.專業實習與專題製作兩系列課程至少須選修一系列之所有課程：</p><p>(1)專業實習（校外）共計四門課，包括應用類畢業專題頂石課程（一）、應用類畢業專題頂石課程（二）、專業實習（一）、與專業實習（二）。</p><p>(2)專題製作（校內）共計兩門課，包括學術類畢業專題頂石課程（一）與學術類畢業專題頂石課程（二）。</p><p>Students must choose between two tracks, Vocational Training or Field Study, as well as the series of courses corresponding to each track:</p><p>(1)Vocational Training (off-campus) is composed of 4 courses: Capstone for Application-Oriented Graduation Topic (I) and (II), and Vocational Training (I) and (II).</p><p>(2)Field Study (on-campus) is composed of two courses, including Capstone for Academic Oriented Graduation Topic (I) and (II).</p><p>5.「應用類畢業專題頂石課程（一）、應用類畢業專題頂石課程（二）、學術類畢業專題頂石課程（一）、學術類畢業專題頂石課程（二）」為本系必修終端學習課程，學生須於「應用類畢業專題頂石課程（二）、學術類畢業專題頂石課程（二）」展現成果。</p><p>Capstone for Application-Oriented Graduation Topic(I)、Capstone for Application-Oriented Graduation Topic(II)、Capstone for Academic Oriented Graduation Topic(I) and Capstone for Academic Oriented Graduation Topic (II) are the compulsory terminal courses of the department, of which students’ achievements must be shown in Capstone for Application-Oriented Graduation Topic (II) and Capstone for Academic Oriented Graduation Topic (II).</p><p>6.「應用類畢業專題頂石課程（一）、學術類畢業專題頂石課程（一）」為本系「議題導向實作專題課程」3學分。 </p><p>Capstone for Application-Oriented Graduation Topic(I)、Capstone for Academic Oriented Graduation Topic(I) is a   three-credit course of "Topic and Implementation-oriented courses".</p><p>7. 「程式設計(二)、網際網路程式設計、系統分析與設計、行動裝置程式設計、Python程式設計」為本系「數位應用相關課程｣，畢業前須修習至少2門「數位應用相關課程」(可至本系或外系修習)。</p><p>Programming (II), Internet Programming, System Analysis and Design, Mobile Device Programming, and Python Programming are courses of 'digital application courses'. Students require taking at least two 'digital application courses'. (Student may take 'digital application courses' from another department.)</p><p>8. 本系同學應修共同必修及通識課程共31學分、本系必修科目73學分、其餘選修科目24學分（外系選修至多承認17學分，與他系合作之學程，依學程規定承認最高學分），總共必須修滿128學分方可畢業。</p><p>Student of Dept. of IM are required to undertake University Compulsory and General Education courses (31), Department Compulsory courses (73), and Elective courses (24), making 128 credits in total for graduation. (Outside the Department of elective up to recognize the (17) credits, and the cooperation courses with other departments, according to the provisions of the highest recognition of credit)</p><p>9. 本系必修科目必須在系上修習方予承認，如有特殊原因需至外系修習者，需於選課時經系主任核准，其學分始得承認。</p><p>Department Compulsory courses must be undertaken within the department, if an individual needs to undertake any of them in other departments, the credits can be admitted only when it’s been approved by the Department Chair .</p><p>10.有關共同必修及通識教育科目之詳細規定，另依據「元智大學共同必修科目表」之規定辦理。</p><p>Please refer to Yuan Ze University Common Required Course List for General Education courses information and regulations.</p><p>11.通識教育科目學分只採計至多10學分，超修之學分將不列入畢業學分。</p><p>  The maximum credits for general education courses is 10, the exceeding credits will not be counted.</p><p>12.為增進學生英文能力，鼓勵選修英語授課課程(含英專班)，其修習之課程科目及學分數之認抵需依學系規定辦理。</p><p>To improve students’ English, we encourage students to take the courses in English (including English Bachelor), which courses and credits waiver and transference should be standardized by each department. </p></td></tr></table>

**Department of Information Management at Yuan Ze University**

**List of Required Courses**

**（112學年度入學新生適用）**

**(Applicable to Students Admitted in Academic Year of 2023)**

112.04.19一一一學年度第六次教務會議通過

Passed by the 6th Academic Affairs Meeting, Academic Year 2022, on April 19, 2023

113.11.20 一一三學年度第二次教務會議修訂通過

Amended by the 2nd Academic Affairs Meeting, Academic Year 2024, on November 20, 2024

114.06.04 一一三學年度第六次教務會議修訂通過

Amended by the 6nd Academic Affairs Meeting, Academic Year 2024, on June 04, 2025

114.11.12 一一四學年度第三次教務會議修訂通過

Amended by the 3rd Academic Affairs Meeting, Academic Year 2025, on November 12, 2025

<table><tr><td rowspan="2"><p>    學年Academic Year</p><p>學期Semester</p><p>科目Subject</p></td><td colspan="2"><p>第一學年 1<sup>st</sup> Academic Year</p></td><td colspan="2"><p>第二學年  2<sup>nd</sup> Academic Year</p></td><td colspan="2"><p>第三學年 3<sup>rd</sup> Academic Year</p></td><td colspan="2"><p>第四學年 4<sup>th</sup> Academic Year</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>上 Fall</p></td><td><p>下Spring</p></td><td><p>上Fall</p></td><td><p>下Spring</p></td><td><p>上Fall</p></td><td><p>下Spring</p></td><td><p>上Fall</p></td><td><p>下Spring</p></td></tr><tr><td rowspan="5"><p>共</p><p>同</p><p>必</p><p>修</p><p>科</p><p>目</p><p>Common Compulsory</p><p>（17）</p></td><td><p>國文（一）</p><p>Chinese (I)</p><p>（2）</p></td><td><p>國文（二）</p><p>Chinese (II)</p><p>（2）</p></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>英語（一）</p><p>English (I)</p><p>（2）</p></td><td><p>英語（二）</p><p>English (II)</p><p>（2）</p></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td colspan="8"><p>外語課程應修習10學分。</p><ol><li>「英語（一）」及「英語（二）」為基礎課程，採能力分級上課，共計二學期四學分。</li><li>除了「英語（一）」及「英語（二）」外，畢業前應修畢三個不同主題式英語課程，共三學期5學分。</li><li>大一英語能力後測「TOEIC模擬測驗」成績未達350分者，應修習「應試加強班」(EL260)。修習「應試加強班」期間之期末TOEIC模擬測驗成績未達350分者，則該科成績將「不及格」，並應再次修習「應試加強班」，直到取得TOEIC模擬測驗分數達350分(含)始得修習其他主題式英語課程。</li><li>另開設「英語檢定」(EL360)計一學期1學分，「英語檢定」之修課限制與注意事項，請參照「通識外語『英語檢定』修課規定」，並由通識教學部公佈後施行。</li></ol><p>外國學生改修華語須經國際語言文化中心審核通過始可改修華語課程10學分，其華語課程10學分應含「華語檢定」1學分，「華語檢定」修課限制與注意事項，請參照「通識外語『英語檢定』修課規定」。</p><p>凡本校大學部外國學生修習「華語(一)」或「華語(二)」任一課程成績未達60分，不得修習「華語(三)」、「華語(四)」。若修習「華語(三)」、「華語(四)」任一課程成績未達60分，不得修習「華語(五)」或「華語檢定」(EL372)。</p><p>The undergraduate students must complete 10 required credits of foreign language courses.</p><ol><li>English (I) &amp; (II) for the total 4 credits: English (I) and (II) are 4 credit elementary courses for the freshmen who are grouped on English competence; to complete within two semesters.</li><li>English thematic course for the total 5 credits: English thematic courses are 5-credit English courses; students are required to obtain 5 credits through 3 different thematic courses for graduation. </li><li>Students who do not reach the 350-point threshold of TOEIC Mock Exam in the end of the freshman year must take “English Testing” (EL260) course. Students will fail the course if they do not score higher than 350 points in TOEIC Mock Exam by the end of the course, and must repeatedly take the course until they can score higher than 350 points. </li><li>“English Testing” (EL360) for the total 1 credit: For the requirements of registering “English Testing”, please refer to "the Regulation for Registering English Test" announced and implemented by the College of General Education.</li></ol><p>Foreign students need approval by ILCC for taking 10 credits of Mandarin Chinese courses as alternative courses of English.</p><p>The undergraduate foreign students must pass Mandarin Chinese (I) and (II) before taking Mandarin Chinese (III) and (IV). Students must pass Mandarin Chinese (III) and (IV) before taking Mandarin Chinese (V) and Chinese Proficiency Test (EL372).</p><p>英語檢定English Testing（1）、經典選讀A Guide to Classics（2）、服務學習Service Learning（1）</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>體育Physical Education（0）</p></td><td><p>體育Physical Education（0）</p></td><td><p>興趣選項體育optional physical education（0）</p></td><td><p>興趣選項體育optional physical education（0）</p></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td colspan="8"><p>大學部必須修習4學期體育課程；其中2學期為大一體育課程原班級上課，另2學期為興趣選項體育課程。</p><p>The undergraduate students must attend the physical education course for 4 semesters; 2 semesters for the freshman physical education courses, the other two semesters for the optional physical education courses.</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>通識教育科目</p><p>General Education</p><p>（10）</p></td><td colspan="8"><p>通識課程分為人文藝術、自然科學、社會科學及生命科學四大類。學生須於四大領域中各選修2學分課程，共計8學分。General Education program comprises four categories：Humanities, Natural Science, Social Science and Life Science. Students are required to take a 2-credit course from each category to get 8 credits before graduation.</p><p>通識跨域課程General Education Interdisciplinary Course：此2學分學生可自由於通識講座課程、微課自主學習或在地多元文化課群中選課。惟外籍生與工程學院英語學士班、資訊學院英語學士班、人文社會學院英語學士班、電機通訊學院英語學士班學生仍須於四大領域中選課，依各院修課規定辦理。Students can select the 2 credits from a General Education Lecture course, Micro Credit courses, Self-Study courses, or Local-Multicultural courses. Only foreign students and undergraduates of International Programs in the Colleges of Engineering, Informatics, Humanities and Social Sciences, as well as Electrical and Communication Engineering are required to take a 2-credit course from the four categories according to each college’s policy before graduation.</p></td></tr><tr><td rowspan="2"><p>院必修科目</p><p>College</p><p>Compulsory</p><p>（4）</p></td><td><p>基礎程式設計(一)</p><p>Fundamental Computer Programming(I)</p><p>（2）</p></td><td><p>基礎程式設計(二)</p><p>Fundamental Computer Programming(II)</p><p>（2）</p></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td colspan="8"><p>程式語言共4學分，依各院修課規則辦理。</p><p>The Fundamental Computer Programming has 4 credits in IM214</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>資料庫管理</p><p>Database Management IM208</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>服務與科技管理</p><p>Service and Technology (II)</p><p>IM120</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>企業概論</p><p>Introduction to Business</p><p>IM242</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p><a></a>網際網路</p><p>程式設計</p><p>Internet Programming IM226</p><p>（3）</p></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>學期</p><p>學分小計</p><p>Credit each semester</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>7</p></td><td><p>6</p></td><td><p>6</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>備</p><p>註</p><p>Remarks</p></td><td colspan="8"><p>1.括弧內數字為學分數。Numbers in brackets mean credits.</p><p>2.「學期學分小計」指系必修科目學分數之合計。</p><p>“Credits each semester” means the amount of credits gained in department compulsory courses. </p><p>3.「微積分(一)、會計學、程式設計(一)、程式設計(二)、統計學(一)、統計學(二)、資料結構」等課程均需修「零學分的演習課」，其中「程式設計(一)、程式設計(二)」之演習課為2小時，其餘為1小時。</p><p> Drills required for students taking Calculus (I) &amp; (II), Accounting, Programming (I) &amp; (II), Statistics (I) &amp; (II), and Fundamental of Data Structures; 2-hour drill for Programming (I) &amp; (II), 1-hour drill for the others.</p><p>4.專業實習與專題製作兩系列課程至少須選修一系列之所有課程：</p><p>(1)專業實習（校外）共計四門課，包括專業實習（一）、專業實習（二）、專業實習（三）與專業實習（四）。</p><p>(2)專題製作（校內）共計兩門課，包括專題製作（一）與專題製作（二）。</p><p>Students must choose between two tracks, Vocational Training or Field Study, as well as the series of courses corresponding to each track:</p><p>(1)Vocational Training (off-campus) is composed of 4 courses: Vocational Training (I), (II) , (III), and (IV).</p><p>(2)Field Study (on-campus) is composed of two courses, including Field Study (I) and (II).</p><p>5.「專業實習(一)、專題製作(一)、專業實習(三)、專題製作(二)」為本系必修終端學習課程，學生須於「專業實習(三)、專題製作(二)」展現成果。</p><p>Vocational Training (Ⅰ)、Field Study (I)、Vocational Training (III)、Field Study (II) are the compulsory terminal courses of the department, of which students’ achievements must be shown in Vocational Training (III)、Field Study (II).</p><p>6.「專業實習(一)、專題製作(一)」為本系「議題導向實作專題課程」3學分。 </p><p>Vocational Training (Ⅰ)、Field Study (I) is a three-credit course of "Topic and Implementation-oriented courses".</p><p>7.「程式設計(二)、網際網路程式設計、系統分析與設計、行動裝置程式設計、Python程式設計」為本系「數位應用相關課程｣，畢業前須修習至少2門「數位應用相關課程」(可至本系或外系修習)。</p><p>Programming (II), Internet Programming, System Analysis and Design, Mobile Device Programming, and Python Programming are courses of 'digital application courses'. Students require taking at least two 'digital application courses'. (Student may take 'digital application courses' from another department.)</p><p>8. 本系同學總共必須修滿 128學分方可畢業，包括共同必修及通識課程共27學分、院必修程式語言課程共4學分、本系必修科目70學分、其餘選修科目27學分（外系選修至多承認17學分，與他系合作之學程，依學程規定承認最高學分）。</p><p>Student of Dept. of IM must take 128 credits in total for graduation, include Required Common Courses and General Education courses (27) credits , College Compulsory Courses Fundamental Computer Programming (4) credits , Department Compulsory courses (70) credits, and Department Elective courses (27) credits. (Outside the Department of elective up to recognize the (17) credits, and the cooperation courses with other departments, according to the provisions of the highest recognition of credit)</p><p>9.本系必修科目必須在系上修習方予承認，如有特殊原因需至外系修習者，需於選課時經系主任核准，其學分始得承認。</p><p>Department Compulsory courses must be undertaken within the department, if an individual needs to undertake any of them in other departments, the credits can be admitted only when it’s been approved by the Department Chair .</p><p>10.有關共同必修及通識教育科目之詳細規定，另依據「元智大學共同必修科目表」之規定辦理。</p><p>Please refer to Yuan Ze University Common Required Course List for General Education courses information and regulations.</p><p>11.通識教育科目學分只採計至多10學分，超修之學分將不列入畢業學分。</p><p>  The maximum credits for general education courses is 10, the exceeding credits will not be counted.</p><p>12.為增進學生英文能力，鼓勵選修英語授課課程(含英專班)，其修習之課程科目及學分數之認抵需依學系規定辦理。</p><p>To improve students’ English, we encourage students to take the courses in English (including English Bachelor), which courses and credits waiver and transference should be standardized by each department. </p><p>13.自106學年度起軍訓課程由必修改為選修，該學分納入當學期修課學分數計算，但不納入畢業總學分計算。</p><p>The military education courses are no longer compulsory starting the 106 academic year. The military education courses will not be accumulated to the graduation requirements, but they can be counted as taken credits for each semester.</p></td></tr></table>

AA-CP-04-CF02 (1.3版)／102.04.19修訂

（II） for the total 4 credits: English （I） and （II） are 4 credits elementary courses for the freshmen who are grouped on English competence; to complete within two semesters.</p><p>3.English thematic course for the total 4 credits: English thematic courses are 4-credit English courses; students are required to obtain 4 credits through 2 different thematic courses for graduation. </p><p>4.Students who do not reach the 350-point threshold of TOEIC Mock Exam in the end of the freshman year must take English Testing （EL260） course. Students will fail the course if they do not score higher than 350 points of TOEIC Mock Exam by the end of the course, and must repeatedly take the course until they can score higher than 350 points. </p><p>5.“English Testing” （EL160） is a 2-credit course: For the requirements of registering “English Testing”, please refer to The Regulation for Registering English Test announced and implemented by the College of General Education.</p><p>6.Foreign students need approval by ILCC for taking 10 credits of Mandarin Chinese courses as alternative courses of English. The 10 credits in Mandarin Chinese courses must include 2 credits for “Chinese Proficiency Test”. For the specific restrictions and considerations for taking the “Chinese Proficiency Test”, please refer to the 'General Education Foreign Language “English Proficiency Exam” Course Requirements' and 'Yuan Ze University Regulations for Exempting the Mandarin Chinese as a Foreign Language Credit ' for more details.</p><p>7. The undergraduate foreign students must pass Mandarin Chinese （I） and （II） before taking Mandarin Chinese （III） and （IV）. Students must pass Mandarin Chinese （III） and （IV） before taking 'Chinese Proficiency Test' （EL375）.</p><p>英語檢定English Testing （2）、經典選讀A Guide to Classics （2）、服務學習Service Learning （1）</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>體育Physical Education（0）</p></td><td><p>體育Physical Education（0）</p></td><td><p>興趣選項體育optional physical education（0）</p></td><td><p>興趣選項體育optional physical education（0）</p></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td colspan="8"><p>大學部必須修習4學期體育課程；其中2學期為大一體育課程原班級上課，另2學期為興趣選項體育課程。</p><p>The undergraduate students must attend the physical education course for 4 semesters; 2 semesters for the freshman physical education courses, the other two semesters for the optional physical education courses.</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>通識教育科目</p><p>General Education</p><p>（10）</p></td><td colspan="8"><p>通識課程分為人文藝術、自然科學、社會科學及生命科學四大類。學生須於四大領域中各選修2學分課程，共計8學分。General Education program comprises four categories：Humanities, Natural Science, Social Science and Life Science. Students are required to take a 2-credit course from each category to get 8 credits before graduation.</p><p>通識跨域課程General Education Interdisciplinary Course：此2學分學生可自由於通識講座課程、微課自主學習或在地多元文化課群中選課。惟外籍生與工程學院英語學士班、資訊學院英語學士班、人文社會學院英語學士班、電機通訊學院英語學士班學生仍須於四大領域中選課，依各院修課規定辦理。Students can select the 2 credits from a General Education Lecture course, Micro Credit courses, Self-Study courses, or Local-Multicultural courses. Only foreign students and undergraduates of International Programs in the Colleges of Engineering, Informatics, Humanities and Social Sciences, as well as Electrical and Communication Engineering are required to take a 2-credit course from the four categories according to each college’s policy before graduation.</p></td></tr><tr><td rowspan="2"><p>院必修科目</p><p>College</p><p>Compulsory</p><p>（4）</p></td><td><p>基礎程式設計(一)</p><p>Fundamental Computer Programming(I)</p><p>CI005</p><p>（2）</p></td><td><p>基礎程式設計(二)</p><p>Fundamental Intelligence IM304</p><p>（3）</p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>學期</p><p>學分小計</p><p>Credit each semester</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>9</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>9</p></td><td><p>7</p></td><td><p>3</p></td><td><p>9</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>備</p><p>註</p><p>Remarks</p></td><td colspan="8"><p>1.括弧內數字為學分數。Numbers in brackets mean credits.</p><p>2.「學期學分小計」指系必修科目學分數之合計。</p><p>“Credits each semester” means the amount of credits gained in department compulsory courses. </p><p>3.「微積分(一)、會計學、程式設計(一)、程式設計(二)、統計學(一)、統計學(二)、資料結構」等課程均需修「零學分的演習課」，其中「程式設計(一)、程式設計(二)」之演習課為2小時，其餘為1小時。</p><p> Drills required for students taking Calculus (I) &amp; (II), Accounting, Programming (I) &amp; (II), Statistics (I) &amp; (II), and Fundamental of Data Structures; 2-hour drill for Programming (I) &amp; (II), 1-hour drill for the others.</p><p>4.專業實習與專題製作兩系列課程至少須選修一系列之所有課程：</p><p>(1)專業實習（校外）共計四門課，包括專業實習（一）、專業實習（二）、專業實習（三）與專業實習（四）。</p><p>(2)專題製作（校內）共計兩門課，包括專題製作（一）與專題製作（二）。</p><p>Students must choose between two tracks, Vocational Training or Field Study, as well as the series of courses corresponding to each track:</p><p>(1)Vocational Training (off-campus) is composed of 4 courses: Vocational Training (I), (II) , (III), and (IV).</p><p>(2)Field Study (on-campus) is composed of two courses, including Field Study (I) and (II).</p><p>5.「專業實習(一)、專題製作(一)、專業實習(三)、專題製作(二)」為本系必修終端學習課程，學生須於「專業實習(三)、專題製作(二)」展現成果。</p><p>Vocational Training (Ⅰ)、Field Study (I)、Vocational Training (III)、Field Study (II) are the compulsory terminal courses of the department, of which students’ achievements must be shown in Vocational Training (III)、Field Study (II).</p><p>6.「專業實習(一)、專題製作(一)」為本系「議題導向實作專題課程」3學分。 </p><p>Vocational Training (Ⅰ)、Field Study (I) is a three-credit course of "Topic and Implementation-oriented courses".</p><p>7.「程式設計(二)、網際網路程式設計、數據分析導論、行動裝置程式設計、系統分析與設計、人工智慧應用、資料探勘、Python程式設計」為本系「數位應用相關課程｣，畢業前須修習至少2門「數位應用相關課程」(可至本系或外系修習)。</p><p>Programming (II), Internet Programming, Introduction to Data Analytics, Mobile Device Programming, System Analysis and Design, Application to Artificial Intelligence, Data Mining and Python Programming are courses of 'digital application courses'. Students require taking at least two 'digital application courses'. (Student may take 'digital application courses' from another department.)</p><p>8. 本系同學總共必須修滿 128學分方可畢業，包括共同必修及通識課程共27學分、院必修程式語言課程共4學分、本系必修科目64學分、其餘選修科目33學分（外系選修至多承認17學分，與他系合作之學程，依學程規定承認最高學分）。</p><p>Student of Dept. of IM must take 128 credits in total for graduation, include Required Common Courses and General Education courses (27) credits , College Compulsory Courses Fundamental Computer Programming (4) credits , Department Compulsory courses (64) credits, and Department Elective courses (33) credits. (Outside the Department of elective up to recognize the (17) credits, and the cooperation courses with other departments, according to the provisions of the highest recognition of credit)</p><p>9.本系必修科目必須在系上修習方予承認，如有特殊原因需至外系修習者，需於選課時經系主任核准，其學分始得承認。</p><p>Department Compulsory courses must be undertaken within the department, if an individual needs to undertake any of them in other departments, the credits can be admitted only when it’s been approved by the Department Chair .</p><p>10.有關共同必修及通識教育科目之詳細規定，另依據「元智大學共同必修科目表」之規定辦理。</p><p>Please refer to Yuan Ze University Common Required Course List for General Education courses information and regulations.</p><p>11.通識教育科目學分只採計至多10學分，超修之學分將不列入畢業學分。</p><p>  The maximum credits for general education courses is 10, the exceeding credits will not be counted.</p><p>12.為增進學生英文能力，鼓勵選修英語授課課程(含英專班)，其修習之課程科目及學分數之認抵需依學系規定辦理。</p><p>To improve students’ English, we encourage students to take the courses in English (including English Bachelor), which courses and credits waiver and transference should be standardized by each department. </p><p>13.自106學年度起軍訓課程由必修改為選修，該學分納入當學期修課學分數計算，但不納入畢業總學分計算。</p><p>The military education courses are no longer compulsory starting the 106 academic year. The military education courses will not be accumulated to the graduation requirements, but they can be counted as taken credits for each semester.</p><p>14.修習碩士班課程以大三以上學生為限，且不得修習碩士在職專班課程。</p><p>Master's degree courses are limited to students in their third year or above, and students are not allowed to take courses from the Executive Master program.</p></td></tr></table>

（II） for the total 4 credits: English （I） and （II） are 4 credits elementary courses for the freshmen who are grouped on English competence; to complete within two semesters.</li><li>English thematic course for the total 4 credits: English thematic courses are 4-credit English courses; students are required to obtain 4 credits through 2 different thematic courses for graduation. </li><li>Students who do not reach the 350-point threshold of TOEIC Mock Exam in the end of the freshman year must take English Testing （EL260） course. Students will fail the course if they do not score higher than 350 points of TOEIC Mock Exam by the end of the course, and must repeatedly take the course until they can score higher than 350 points. </li><li>“English Testing” （EL160） is a 2-credit course: For the requirements of registering “English Testing”, please refer to The Regulation for Registering English Test announced and implemented by the College of General Education.</li><li>Foreign students could take 10 credits of Mandarin Chinese courses as alternative courses of English. The 10 credits in Mandarin Chinese courses must include 2 credits for “Chinese Proficiency Test”. For the specific restrictions and considerations for taking the “Chinese Proficiency Test”, please refer to the 'General Education Foreign Language “English Proficiency Exam” Course Requirements' and 'Yuan Ze University Regulations for Exempting the Mandarin Chinese as a Foreign Language Credit ' for more details.</li><li>The undergraduate foreign students must pass Mandarin Chinese （I） and （II） before taking Mandarin Chinese （III） and （IV）. Students must pass Mandarin Chinese （III） and （IV） before taking 'Chinese Proficiency Test' （EL375）.</li></ol><p> 英語檢定English Testing （2）、經典選讀A Guide to Classics （2）、服務學習Service Learning （1）</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>體育Physical Education（0）</p></td><td><p>體育Physical Education（0）</p></td><td><p>興趣選項體育optional physical education（0）</p></td><td><p>興趣選項體育optional physical education（0）</p></td><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td colspan="8"><p>大學部必須修習4學期體育課程；其中2學期為大一體育課程原班級上課，另2學期為興趣選項體育課程。</p><p>The undergraduate students must attend the physical education course for 4 semesters; 2 semesters for the freshman physical education courses, the other two semesters for the optional physical education courses.</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>通識教育科目</p><p>General Education</p><p>（10）</p></td><td colspan="8"><p>通識課程分為人文藝術、自然科學、社會科學及生命科學四大類。學生須於四大領域中各選修2學分課程，共計8學分。General Education program comprises four categories：Humanities, Natural Science, Social Science and Life Science. Students are required to take a 2-credit course from each category to get 8 credits before graduation.</p><p>通識跨域課程General Education Interdisciplinary Course：此2學分學生可自由於通識講座課程、微課自主學習或在地多元文化課群中選課。惟外籍生與工程學院英語學士班、資訊學院英語學士班、人文社會學院英語學士班、電機通訊學院英語學士班學生仍須於四大領域中選課，依各院修課規定辦理。Students can select the 2 credits from a General Education Lecture course, Micro Credit courses, Self-Study courses, or Local-Multicultural courses. Only foreign students and undergraduates of International Programs in the Colleges of Engineering, Informatics, Humanities and Social Sciences, as well as Electrical and Communication Engineering are semester</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>9</p></td><td><p>7</p></td><td><p>6</p></td><td><p>9</p></td><td><p>0</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>備</p><p>註</p><p>Remarks</p></td><td colspan="8"><p>1.括弧內數字為學分數。Numbers in brackets mean credits.</p><p>2.「學期學分小計」指系必修科目學分數之合計。</p><p>“Credits each semester” means the amount of credits gained in department compulsory courses. </p><p>3.「微積分(一)、會計學、程式設計(一)、程式設計(二)、統計學(一)、統計學(二)、資料結構」等課程均需修「零學分的演習課」，其中「程式設計(一)、程式設計(二)」之演習課為2小時，其餘為1小時。</p><p> Drills required for students taking Calculus (I) &amp; (II), Accounting, Programming (I) &amp; (II), Statistics (I) &amp; (II), and Fundamental of Data Structures; 2-hour drill for Programming (I) &amp; (II), 1-hour drill for the others.</p><p>4.專業實習與專題製作兩系列課程至少須選修一系列之所有課程：</p><p>(1)專業實習（校外）共計四門課，包括專業實習（一）、專業實習（二）、專業實習（三）與專業實習（四）。</p><p>(2)專題製作（校內）共計兩門課，包括專題製作（一）與專題製作（二）。</p><p>Students must choose between two tracks, Vocational Training or Field Study, as well as the series of courses corresponding to each track:</p><p>(1)Vocational Training (off-campus) is composed of 4 courses: Vocational Training (I), (II) , (III), and (IV).</p><p>(2)Field Study (on-campus) is composed of two courses, including Field Study (I) and (II).</p><p>5.「專業實習(一)、專題製作(一)、專業實習(三)、專題製作(二)」為本系必修終端學習課程，學生須於「專業實習(三)、專題製作(二)」展現成果。</p><p>Vocational Training (Ⅰ)、Field Study (I)、Vocational Training (III)、Field Study (II) are the compulsory terminal courses of the department, of which students’ achievements must be shown in Vocational Training (III)、Field Study (II).</p><p>6.「專業實習(一)、專題製作(一)」為本系「議題導向實作專題課程」3學分。 </p><p>Vocational Training (Ⅰ)、Field Study (I) is a three-credit course of "Topic and Implementation-oriented courses".</p><p>7.「程式設計(二)、網際網路程式設計、數據分析導論、行動裝置程式設計、系統分析與設計、人工智慧應用、資料探勘、Python程式設計」為本系「數位應用相關課程｣，畢業前須修習至少2門「數位應用相關課程」(可至本系或外系修習)。</p><p>Programming (II), Internet Programming, Introduction to Data Analytics, Mobile Device Programming, System Analysis and Design, Application to Artificial Intelligence, Data Mining and Python Programming are courses of 'digital application courses'. Students require taking at least two 'digital application courses'. (Student may take 'digital application courses' from another department.)</p><p>8. 本系同學總共必須修滿 128學分方可畢業，包括共同必修及通識課程共27學分、院必修程式語言課程共4學分、本系必修科目67學分、其餘選修科目30學分（自由選修至多承認17學分，含自主學習3學分。與他系合作之學程，依學程規定承認最高學分）。</p><p>Student of Dept. of IM must take 128 credits in total for graduation, include Required Common Courses and General Education courses (27) credits , College Compulsory Courses Fundamental Computer Programming (4) credits , Department Compulsory courses (67) credits, and Department Elective courses (30) credits. （A maximum of （17） credits can be recognized for free electives, including 3 credits for self-directed learning. For the cooperation courses with other departments, credits will be recognized according to the specific program regulations.）</p><p>9.本系必修科目必須在系上修習方予承認，如有特殊原因需至外系修習者，需於選課時經系主任核准，其學分始得承認。</p><p>Department Compulsory courses must be undertaken within the department, if an individual needs to undertake any of them in other departments, the credits can be admitted only when it’s been approved by the Department Chair .</p><p>10.有關共同必修及通識教育科目之詳細規定，另依據「元智大學共同必修科目表」之規定辦理。</p><p>Please refer to Yuan Ze University Common Required Course List for General Education courses information and regulations.</p><p>11.通識教育科目學分只採計至多10學分，超修之學分將不列入畢業學分。</p><p>  The maximum credits for general education courses is 10, the exceeding credits will not be counted.</p><p>12.為增進學生英文能力，鼓勵選修英語授課課程(含英專班)，其修習之課程科目及學分數之認抵需依學系規定辦理。</p><p>To improve students’ English, we encourage students to take the courses in English (including English Bachelor), which courses and credits waiver and transference should be standardized by each department. </p><p>13.自106學年度起軍訓課程由必修改為選修，該學分納入當學期修課學分數計算，但不納入畢業總學分計算。</p><p>The military education courses are no longer compulsory starting the 106 academic year. The military education courses will not be accumulated to the graduation requirements, but they can be counted as taken credits for each semester.</p><p>14.修習碩士班課程以大三以上學生為限，且不得修習碩士在職專班課程。</p><p>Master's degree courses are limited to students in their third year or above, and students are not allowed to take courses from the Executive Master program.</p></td></tr></table>

**元智大學資訊學院與南昌大學軟件學院雙聯學制**

**資訊管理學系 學士班 修課計畫**

**（103學年度入學新生適用）**

103.04.09 一○二學年度第六次教務會議通過

<strong><u>畢業要求：</u></strong>

※修習48學分， 16門課。

‧4門核心課，12學分。

‧12門選修課，36學分。

‧若入學年度有新開課程，擇採學分抵免方式辦理。

※畢業授予「管理學學士」(B.I.M)學位。

<strong><u>課程架構：</u></strong>

核心課程（任選4門）

‧入學時為二年級，則可選擇二、三年級課程修習。

‧入學時為三年級，則可選擇三、四年級課程修習。

**資訊管理學系 學士班 修課計畫**

**（105學年度入學新生適用）**

105.04.20 一○四學年度第五次教務會議通過

<strong><u>畢業要求：</u></strong>

※修習48學分，16門課。

‧4門核心課，12學分。

‧12門選修課，36學分。

※畢業授予「管理學學士」(B.I.M)學位。

核心課程（任選4門）

‧入學時為二年級，則可選擇二、三年級課程修習。

註： 1、必修科目共計30學分，在主系已修習該課程者，得申請以選修科目取代。

2、本系有擋修規定：

(1)「程式設計一」低於40分擋修「程式設計二」。

(2)「程式設計二」低於60分擋修「資料結構」。

(3)「微積分上」低於50分擋修「微積分下」。

(4)「統計學上」低於50分擋修「統計學下」。

3、「會計學」、「統計學」、「程式設計一」、「程式設計二」、「資料結構」等課程均需修「零學分的演習課」。

4、選修本系為輔系之學生必須在本系修滿27學分(含)以上，才予承認輔系資格。
```

(3)「微積分上」低於50分擋修「微積分下」。

4、選修本系為輔系之學生必須在本系修滿27學分(含)以上，才予承認輔系資格。

註：

1、必修科目共計**27**學分，在主系已修習該課程者，得申請以選修科目取代。

2、本系有擋修規定：

(1)「程式設計一」低於60分擋修「程式設計二」。

(2)「程式設計一」低於60分擋修「資料結構」。

(3)「微積分上」低於50分擋修「微積分下」。

(4)「統計學上」低於50分擋修「統計學下」。

3、「會計學」、「程式設計一」、「程式設計二」、「統計學」、「資料結構」等課程均需修「零學分的演習課」，其中「程式設計一、程式設計二」之演習課為2小時，其餘為1小時。

4、選修本系為輔系之學生必須在本系修滿27學分(含)以上，才予承認輔系資格。

AA-CP-04-CF09 (1.2版)／101.11.15修訂

註 Notes：

1. 必修科目共計27學分，在主系已修習該課程者，得申請以選修科目取代。

Compulsory courses cover 27 credits in total; individuals can apply for the alternative of taking other elective courses if any of the courses listed above have been taken in the original department.

2、本系有擋修規定/ Prerequisites courses of the Department of Information Management：

(1)「程式設計一」低於60分擋修「程式設計二」。

Taking *Programming (II)* requires prerequisite *Programming (I)* score 60 or above.

(2)「程式設計一」低於60分擋修「資料結構」。

Taking *Fundamental of Data Structures* requires prerequisite *Programming (I)* score 60 or above.

(3)「程式設計一」低於60分擋修「系統分析與設計」。

Taking *System Analysis and Design* requires prerequisite *Programming (I)* score 60 or above.

(4)「微積分一」低於50分擋修「微積分二」。

Taking *Calculus (II)* requires prerequisite *Calculus (I)* score 50 or above.

(4)「統計學一」低於50分擋修「統計學二」。

Taking *Statistics (II)* requires prerequisite *Statistics (I)* score 50 or above.

3、「會計學」、「程式設計一」、「程式設計二」、「統計學」、「資料結構」等課程均需修「零學分的演習課」，其中「程式設計一、程式設計二」之演習課為2小時，其餘為1小時。

Drills required for students taking *Accounting*, *Programming (I) & (II)*, *Statistics*, and *Fundamental of Data Structures*; 2-hour drill for *Programming (I) & (II)*, 1-hour drill for the others.

4、選修本系為輔系之學生必須在本系修滿27學分(含)以上，才予承認輔系資格。

An individual student who minors in Information Management must undertake courses offered within the Department up to 27 credits and above before he/she can have the minor admitted.
```

Science</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>財務管理</p><p>Financial Management</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>生產與作業管理</p><p>Production and Operations Management</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>決策支援系統</p><p>Decision Support Systems</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>行銷管理</p><p>Marketing Management</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>軟體專案管理</p><p>Software Project Management</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>演算法</p><p>Algorithms</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>網際網路程式設計</p><p>Internet Programming</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>計算機組織</p><p>Computer Organization</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>人工智慧應用</p><p>Application to Artificial Intelligence</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>計算機作業系統</p><p>Operating Systems</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>資訊決策理論</p><p>Information Decision Theory</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>軟體工程</p><p>Software Engineering</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>資訊管理個案 </p><p>Case Study of Information Management</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>資訊網路行銷</p><p>Information Internet Marketing</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>策略分析</p><p>Strategy Analysis</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>電子商務技術模式</p><p>Electronic Commerce Technology Model</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>共計 Total</p></td><td><p>60</p></td></tr></table>

AA-CP-04-CF09 (1.2版)／101.11.15修訂

註 Notes：

1. 必修科目共計27學分，在主系已修習該課程者，得申請以選修科目取代。

Compulsory courses cover 27 credits in total; individuals can apply for the alternative of taking other elective courses if any of the courses listed above have been taken in the original department.

2、本系有擋修規定/ Prerequisites courses of the Department of Information Management：

(1)「程式設計一」低於60分擋修「程式設計二」。

Taking *Programming (II)* requires prerequisite *Programming (I)* score 60 or above.

(2)「程式設計一」低於60分擋修「資料結構」。

Taking *Fundamental of Data Structures* requires prerequisite *Programming (I)* score 60 or above.

(3)「程式設計一」低於60分擋修「系統分析與設計」。

Taking *System Analysis and Design* requires prerequisite *Programming (I)* score 60 or above.

(4)「微積分一」低於50分擋修「微積分二」。

Taking *Calculus (II)* requires prerequisite *Calculus (I)* score 50 or above.

(4)「統計學一」低於50分擋修「統計學二」。

Taking *Statistics (II)* requires prerequisite *Statistics (I)* score 50 or above.

**3.「會計學」、「程式設計一」、「程式設計二」、「統計學(一)」、「統計學(二)」、「資料結構」等課程均需修「零學分的演習課」，其中「程式設計(一)、程式設計(二)」之演習課為2小時，其餘為1小時。**

**Drills required for students taking Accounting, Programming (I) & (II), Statistics (I) & (II), and Fundamental of Data Structures; 2-hour drill for Programming (I) & (II), 1-hour drill for the others.**

4、選修本系為輔系之學生必須在本系修滿27學分(含)以上，才予承認輔系資格。

An individual student who minors in Information Management must undertake courses offered within the Department up to 27 credits and above before he/she can have the minor admitted.
```

<!-- OCR_END -->

Compulsory courses cover 24 credits in total; individuals can apply for the alternative of taking other elective courses if any of the courses listed above have been taken in the original department.

2、本系有擋修規定/ Prerequisites courses of the Department of Information Management：

(1)「程式設計一」低於60分擋修「資料結構」。

Taking *Fundamental of Data Structures* requires prerequisite *Programming (I)* score 60 or above.

(2)「程式設計二」低於60分擋修「系統分析與設計」。

Taking *System Analysis and Design* requires prerequisite *Programming (II)* score 60 or above.

(3)「微積分一」低於50分擋修「微積分二」。

Taking *Calculus (II)* requires prerequisite *Calculus (I)* score 50 or above.

(4)「統計學一」低於50分擋修「統計學二」。

Taking *Statistics (II)* requires prerequisite *Statistics (I)* score 50 or above.

3.「會計學」、「程式設計一」、「程式設計二」、「統計學(一)」、「統計學(二)」、「資料結構」等課程均需修「零學分的演習課」，其中「程式設計(一)、程式設計(二)」之演習課為2小時，其餘為1小時。

Drills required for students taking Accounting, Programming (I) & (II), Statistics (I) & (II), and Fundamental of Data Structures; 2-hour drill for Programming (I) & (II), 1-hour drill for the others.

4、選修本系為輔系之學生必須在本系修滿27學分(含)以上，才予承認輔系資格。

An individual student who minors in Information Management must undertake courses offered within the Department up to 27 credits and above before he/she can have the minor admitted.
