**元智大學資訊管理學系碩士班研究生**

**資訊管理組(國際雙聯學位)　修業規定**

**(104學年度入學新生適用)**

104.04.22 一○三學年度第五次教務會議通過

第一條　本國際雙聯學位研究生最低修業年限為一年半，最長不可超過四年，最低畢業學分為三十學分。本研究生修畢所有相關課業規定並完成碩士論文後，將分別獲得元智大學管理學碩士學位(Master of Science,簡稱MS)與澳洲西雪梨大學MBA (Master of Business & Administration)。

第二條　本學位研究生須具備IELTS (Academic) 6.5 overall score with a minimum 6.0 in each subtest或TOEFL 575(minimum 4.5 in TWE)或TOEFL computer based test 232 (minimum 4.5 in Essay Rating)之程度，並取得澳洲西雪梨大學之入學許可與澳洲政府核發之簽證，方可進入西雪梨大學就讀。

第三條　本學位課程包含必修及選修科目二類，詳如雙聯學位必、選修科目表。

第四條　本學位研究生若因特殊原因無法完成必選修科目表中所列之澳洲西雪梨大學部份課程者，須提出申請，經指導教授及系務會議通過核可後，始得同意其修抵本校替代課程。修畢替代課程並完成碩士論文者，則授予元智大學MBA碩士學位。

第五條　本學位研究生新生須於開學後二週內選定課業指導教授，在未選定碩士論文指導教授前，由課業指導教授輔導其選課及一切修課相關事宜。

第六條　本學位研究生之碩士論文指導教授須為本系之專任教授、副教授或助理教授，若指導教授非本系之教師時，則須由課業指導教授推薦，並經系務會議通過後，得選定非本系之教師擔任論文指導教授，但仍須與本系之專任教師一名以上共同指導。

第七條　本學位研究生須於第一學年第二學期結束前二週選定碩士論文指導教授，並至本系完成登錄程序。本系研究生得於碩士論文研究計畫審查前，申請變更論文指導教授，唯須分別經原任與新任指導教授同意，並送請系主任核備。

第八條　本學位研究生須經碩士論文指導教授提案及系務會議同意後，始得申請碩士論文研究計畫審查。

第九條　本學位研究生所提之碩士論文研究計畫經該生碩士論文指導教授審查通過後，即可依規定程序申請論文口試。未能通過審查之碩士論文研究計畫，至少需間隔一個月以上，始得提出再審。研究生上學期須於十二月十五日前，下學期須於六月十五日前完成碩士論文研究計畫審查通過，否則該研究生不得在次一學期提出論文口試之申請。

第十條　本學位研究生需負擔本系安排之助教或研究助理性質之工作。其工作內容包括擔任實驗室值班助教、協助監考、批改作業、考卷、成績統計及輔導大學部同學等工作。

第十一條　其他本規則未定事宜，悉遵照本校及教育部相關規定辦理。

第十二條　本辦法經系務會議通過，送教務處核備後實施，修正時亦同。
```

**元智大學資訊管理學系碩士班研究生**

**資訊管理組(國際雙聯學位)　修業規定**

**(105學年度入學新生適用)**

105.04.20 一○四學年度第五次教務會議通過

第一條　本國際雙聯學位研究生最低修業年限為一年半，最長不可超過四年，最低畢業學分為三十學分。本研究生修畢所有相關課業規定並完成碩士論文後，將分別獲得元智大學管理學碩士學位(Master of Science,簡稱MS)與澳洲西雪梨大學MBA (Master of Business & Administration)。

第二條　本學位研究生須具備IELTS (Academic) 6.5 overall score with a minimum 6.0 in each subtest或TOEFL 575(minimum 4.5 in TWE)或TOEFL computer based test 232 (minimum 4.5 in Essay Rating)之程度，並取得澳洲西雪梨大學之入學許可與澳洲政府核發之簽證，方可進入西雪梨大學就讀。

第三條　本學位課程包含必修及選修科目二類，詳如雙聯學位必、選修科目表。

第四條　本學位研究生若因特殊原因無法完成必選修科目表中所列之澳洲西雪梨大學部份課程者，須提出申請，經指導教授及系務會議通過核可後，始得同意其修抵本校替代課程。修畢替代課程並完成碩士論文者，則授予元智大學MS碩士學位。

第五條　本學位研究生新生須於開學後二週內選定課業指導教授，在未選定碩士論文指導教授前，由課業指導教授輔導其選課及一切修課相關事宜。

第六條　本學位研究生之碩士論文指導教授須為本系之專任教授、副教授或助理教授，若指導教授非本系之教師時，則須由課業指導教授推薦，並經系務會議通過後，得選定非本系之教師擔任論文指導教授，但仍須與本系之專任教師一名以上共同指導。

第七條　本學位研究生須於第一學年第二學期結束前二週選定碩士論文指導教授，並至本系完成登錄程序。本系研究生得於碩士論文研究計畫審查前，申請變更論文指導教授，唯須分別經原任與新任指導教授同意，並送請系主任核備。

第八條　本學位研究生須經碩士論文指導教授提案及系務會議同意後，始得申請碩士論文研究計畫審查。

第九條　本學位研究生所提之碩士論文研究計畫經該生碩士論文指導教授審查通過後，即可依規定程序申請論文口試。未能通過審查之碩士論文研究計畫，至少需間隔一個月以上，始得提出再審。研究生上學期須於十二月十五日前，下學期須於六月十五日前完成碩士論文研究計畫審查通過，否則該研究生不得在次一學期提出論文口試之申請。

第十條　本學位研究生需負擔本系安排之助教或研究助理性質之工作。其工作內容包括擔任實驗室值班助教、協助監考、批改作業、考卷、成績統計及輔導大學部同學等工作。

第十一條　本學位研究生須依本校學術研究倫理教育課程實施要點規定，於入學第一學期結束前完成學術研究倫理教育課程，最遲須於申請學位口試前補修完成，未完成本課程，不得申請學位口試。

第十二條　其他本規則未定事宜，悉遵照本校及教育部相關規定辦理。

第十三條　本辦法經系務會議通過，送教務處核備後實施，修正時亦同。
```

<!-- OCR_END -->

- **160. [超連結（檔案）]**: files/COURSES/701IM/105IM-MMtech.docx

**Appendix：** Master of Business and Administration Program Structure

**General Foundation Units (40CP)**

1. The Contemporary Business Environment
2. Business Communication Skills
3. Understanding Contemporary Organisations
4. Integrated Business Experience 1

**Core Units (40CP)**

5. Financial Reports for Decision Making
6. Contemporary People Management
7. Integrated Business Experience 2
8. Economics PG

**Specialist Knowledge Units (60CP)**

<table><tr><td><p><strong>Finance and Investment</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Corporate Finance </p><p>Financial Institutions and Markets (MAF) </p><p>International Finance </p><p>Security Analysis and Portfolio Theory </p><p>Property Investment Analysis </p><p>Property Portfolio Analysis </p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Hospitality and Tourism</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Gastronomy and the Food and Beverage Experience<br/>Facilities and Venue Management<br/>Tourism Management<br/>Event Management<br/>Hospitality and Tourism In Society<br/>Strategic Marketing for Hospitality and Tourism</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Human Resources Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Industrial Relations and Workplace Change<br/>Strategic Employment Relations<br/>Employment Relations Professional Practice<br/>Reward Management</p><p>Developing Human Capital and Organisational Capability<br/>Diversity, Labour Markets and Workforce Planning</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Information and Communications Technology</strong> (60CP)</p></td><td><p>Programming Proficiency </p><p>Advanced Topics in User System Interaction </p><p>Systems Analysis and Database Management Systems </p><p>Network Technologies </p><p>Choose any one </p><ol><li>Web Technologies </li><li>Mobile Computing </li><li>Intelligent Agents for E-Markets </li></ol><p>Choose any one </p><ol><li>Content Management Systems &amp; Web Analytics </li><li>Big Data (PG) </li><li>Cloud Computing </li><li>Workflow Management Systems </li></ol></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Innovation and Entrepreneurship</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Innovation for New Markets<br/>Innovation, Creativity and Foresight<br/>New Venture Finance<br/>Entrepreneurial Management Capabilities<br/>Innovation through Digital Technology<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Logistics and Supply Chain Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Project Management<br/>Supply Chain Management<br/>Purchasing and Materials Management<br/>Compliance Management<br/>Logistics Processes In Erp<br/>Business Operations and Logistics</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><h3>Managing In The Global Context</h3><h3>Strategic Business Management<br/>Compliance Management</h3><h3>Leading Contemporary Organisations</h3><h3>Innovation, Creativity and Foresight<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship</h3></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Marketing</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Marketing Systems<br/>Buyer Behaviour<br/>Applied Marketing Solutions<br/>Integrated Brand Management<br/>Business Marketing<br/>Strategic Marketing For Managers</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Property</strong> </p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Property Valuation </p><p>Property Finance and Taxation </p><p>Property Feasibility Study </p><p>Property Investment Analysis </p><p>Property Development </p><p>Property Portfolio Analysis </p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Sustainable Business</strong></p><p> (60CP)</p></td><td><p>Creating Sustainable Organisations</p><p>Business, Society and the Environment<br/>Social and Environmental Accounting<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship<br/>Developing Sustainable Places<br/>Innovation, Creativity and Foresight</p></td></tr></table>

**Capstone Units (20CP)**

9. Business Project OR Internship

```markdown
**元智大學資訊管理學系碩士班研究生**

**資訊管理組(國際雙聯學位)　修業規定**

**（106學年度入學新生適用）**

106.04.26 一○五學年度第五次教務會議通過

第一條　本國際雙聯學位研究生最低修業年限為一年半，最長不可超過四年，最低畢業學分為三十學分。本研究生修畢所有相關課業規定並完成碩士論文後，將分別獲得元智大學管理學碩士學位(Master of Science,簡稱MS)與澳洲西雪梨大學MBA (Master of Business & Administration)。

第二條　本學位研究生須具備IELTS (Academic) 6.5 overall score with a minimum 6.0 in each subtest或TOEFL 575(minimum 4.5 in TWE)或TOEFL computer based test 232 (minimum 4.5 in Essay Rating)之程度，並取得澳洲西雪梨大學之入學許可與澳洲政府核發之簽證，方可進入西雪梨大學就讀。

第三條　本學位課程包含必修及選修科目二類，詳如雙聯學位必、選修科目表。

第四條　本學位研究生若因特殊原因無法完成必選修科目表中所列之澳洲西雪梨大學部份課程者，須提出申請，經指導教授及系務會議通過核可後，始得同意其修抵本校替代課程。修畢替代課程並完成碩士論文者，則授予元智大學MS碩士學位。

第五條　本學位研究生新生須於開學後二週內選定課業指導教授，在未選定碩士論文指導教授前，由課業指導教授輔導其選課及一切修課相關事宜。

第六條　本學位研究生之碩士論文指導教授須為本系之專任教授、副教授或助理教授，若指導教授非本系之教師時，則須由課業指導教授推薦，並經系務會議通過後，得選定非本系之教師擔任論文指導教授，但仍須與本系之專任教師一名以上共同指導。

第七條　本學位研究生須於第一學年第二學期結束前二週選定碩士論文指導教授，並至本系完成登錄程序。本系研究生得於碩士論文研究計畫審查前，申請變更論文指導教授，唯須分別經原任與新任指導教授同意，並送請系主任核備。

第八條　本學位研究生須經碩士論文指導教授提案及系務會議同意後，始得申請碩士論文研究計畫審查。

第九條　本學位研究生所提之碩士論文研究計畫經該生碩士論文指導教授審查通過後，即可依規定程序申請論文口試。未能通過審查之碩士論文研究計畫，至少需間隔一個月以上，始得提出再審。研究生上學期須於十二月十五日前，下學期須於六月十五日前完成碩士論文研究計畫審查通過，否則該研究生不得在次一學期提出論文口試之申請。

第十條　本學位研究生需負擔本系安排之助教或研究助理性質之工作。其工作內容包括擔任實驗室值班助教、協助監考、批改作業、考卷、成績統計及輔導大學部同學等工作。

第十一條　本學位研究生須依本校學術研究倫理教育課程實施要點規定，於入學第一學期結束前完成學術研究倫理教育課程，最遲須於申請學位口試前補修完成，未完成本課程，不得申請學位口試。

第十二條　其他本規則未定事宜，悉遵照本校及教育部相關規定辦理。

第十三條　本辦法經系務會議通過，送教務處核備後實施，修正時亦同。
```

<!-- OCR_END -->

- **162. [超連結（檔案）]**: files/COURSES/701IM/105IM-MMtech.docx

**Appendix：** Master of Business and Administration Program Structure

**General Foundation Units (40CP)**

1. The Contemporary Business Environment
2. Business Communication Skills
3. Understanding Contemporary Organisations
4. Integrated Business Experience 1

**Core Units (40CP)**

5. Financial Reports for Decision Making
6. Contemporary People Management
7. Integrated Business Experience 2
8. Economics PG

**Specialist Knowledge Units (60CP)**

<table><tr><td><p><strong>Finance and Investment</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Corporate Finance </p><p>Financial Institutions and Markets (MAF) </p><p>International Finance </p><p>Security Analysis and Portfolio Theory </p><p>Property Investment Analysis </p><p>Property Portfolio Analysis </p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Hospitality and Tourism</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Gastronomy and the Food and Beverage Experience<br/>Facilities and Venue Management<br/>Tourism Management<br/>Event Management<br/>Hospitality and Tourism In Society<br/>Strategic Marketing for Hospitality and Tourism</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Human Resources Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Industrial Relations and Workplace Change<br/>Strategic Employment Relations<br/>Employment Relations Professional Practice<br/>Reward Management</p><p>Developing Human Capital and Organisational Capability<br/>Diversity, Labour Markets and Workforce Planning</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Information and Communications Technology</strong> (60CP)</p></td><td><p>Programming Proficiency </p><p>Advanced Topics in User System Interaction </p><p>Systems Analysis and Database Management Systems </p><p>Network Technologies </p><p>Choose any one </p><ol><li>Web Technologies </li><li>Mobile Computing </li><li>Intelligent Agents for E-Markets </li></ol><p>Choose any one </p><ol><li>Content Management Systems &amp; Web Analytics </li><li>Big Data (PG) </li><li>Cloud Computing </li><li>Workflow Management Systems </li></ol></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Innovation and Entrepreneurship</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Innovation for New Markets<br/>Innovation, Creativity and Foresight<br/>New Venture Finance<br/>Entrepreneurial Management Capabilities<br/>Innovation through Digital Technology<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Logistics and Supply Chain Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Project Management<br/>Supply Chain Management<br/>Purchasing and Materials Management<br/>Compliance Management<br/>Logistics Processes In Erp<br/>Business Operations and Logistics</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><h3>Managing In The Global Context</h3><h3>Strategic Business Management<br/>Compliance Management</h3><h3>Leading Contemporary Organisations</h3><h3>Innovation, Creativity and Foresight<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship</h3></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Marketing</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Marketing Systems<br/>Buyer Behaviour<br/>Applied Marketing Solutions<br/>Integrated Brand Management<br/>Business Marketing<br/>Strategic Marketing For Managers</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Property</strong> </p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Property Valuation </p><p>Property Finance and Taxation </p><p>Property Feasibility Study </p><p>Property Investment Analysis </p><p>Property Development </p><p>Property Portfolio Analysis </p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Sustainable Business</strong></p><p> (60CP)</p></td><td><p>Creating Sustainable Organisations</p><p>Business, Society and the Environment<br/>Social and Environmental Accounting<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship<br/>Developing Sustainable Places<br/>Innovation, Creativity and Foresight</p></td></tr></table>

**Capstone Units (20CP)**

9. Business Project OR Internship

Management）</p><p>IM520</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>企業管理專題</p><p>（Seminar on Business Administration）</p><p>IM518</p><p>（3）</p></td><td rowspan="7"><p>Qualification for this award requires the successful completion of 80 credit points which include the units listed below. </p><p><a></a><strong>General Foundation Units (40CP) </strong>可申請抵免</p><ol><li>The Contemporary Business Environment </li><li>Business Communication Skills </li><li>Understanding Contemporary Organisations </li><li>Integrated Business Experience 1 </li></ol><p><strong>Core Units (40CP) Knowledge Units (60CP)</strong></p><ul><li>Finance and Investment</li><li>Hospitality and Tourism </li><li>Human Resources Management </li><li>Information and Communications Technology </li><li>Innovation and Entrepreneurship </li><li>Logistics and Supply Chain Management </li><li>Management </li><li>Marketing </li><li>Property </li><li>Sustainable Business </p></td><td colspan="2"><p>12 + 12選修(註2)</p></td><td><p>24 (80 CP)</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>備註</p><p>Remarks</p><p>全文完</p></td><td colspan="3"><p>1.畢業最低總學分數為48學分，另加碩士論文一篇。</p><p>Students must take a minimum of 48 credits and complete one master thesis for graduation.</p><p>2.選修課程需於附表-元智大學資訊管理學系碩士班資訊管理組(國際雙聯學位)選修科目表中任選12學分。</p><p>Student must at least take and complete 12 credits out of the elective courses listed in the attached file, named the “Master Program of Information Management Department at Yuan Ze University Information Management Track (International Dual Degree) List of Elective Courses”.</p><p>3.須配合「澳洲西雪梨大學」Quarter制入學修課時間。</p><p>Please make sure that you begin the program in accordance to the Quarter sessions of UWS.</p><p>4.學生應於元智大學資管系碩士班成功完成第一學期的課程要求，始得向UWS申請。</p><p>Only if students have successfully completed the courses required in the Fall semester can they begin to apply for the course at UWS.</p><p>5.澳洲西雪梨大學之授予學位與修課要求，悉依照入學年度西雪梨大學的規定辦理。</p><p>The awarded degree and course requirements of UWS should follow the rule of admission year.</p><p>6.研究生須依本校學術研究倫理教育課程實施要點規定，於入學第一學期結束前完成學術研究倫理教育課程，最遲須於申請學位口試前補修完成，未完成本課程，不得申請學位口試。</p><p>For those graduate students who shall complete Academic Research Ethics Education Course before the end of their first academic semester, they must follow the regulations of Yuan Ze University Academic Research Ethics Education Course Implementation Highlights. The latest deadline for them shall be their course completions and then their applications towards the degree’s oral exam.</p></td></tr></table>

Passed by the 5st Academic Affairs Meeting, Academic Year 2016, on April 26, 2017

**Appendix：** Master of Business and Administration Program Structure

**General Foundation Units (40CP)**

1. The Contemporary Business Environment
2. Business Communication Skills
3. Understanding Contemporary Organisations
4. Integrated Business Experience 1

**Core Units (40CP)**

5. Financial Reports for Decision Making
6. Contemporary People Management
7. Integrated Business Experience 2
8. Economics PG

**Specialist Knowledge Units (60CP)**

<table><tr><td><p><strong>Finance and Investment</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Corporate Finance </p><p>Financial Institutions and Markets (MAF) </p><p>International Finance </p><p>Security Analysis and Portfolio Theory </p><p>Property Investment Analysis </p><p>Property Portfolio Analysis </p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Hospitality and Tourism</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Gastronomy and the Food and Beverage Experience<br/>Facilities and Venue Management<br/>Tourism Management<br/>Event Management<br/>Hospitality and Tourism In Society<br/>Strategic Marketing for Hospitality and Tourism</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Human Resources Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Industrial Relations and Workplace Change<br/>Strategic Employment Relations<br/>Employment Relations Professional Practice<br/>Reward Management</p><p>Developing Human Capital and Organisational Capability<br/>Diversity, Labour Markets and Workforce Planning</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Information and Communications Technology</strong> (60CP)</p></td><td><p>Programming Proficiency </p><p>Advanced Topics in User System Interaction </p><p>Systems Analysis and Database Management Systems </p><p>Network Technologies </p><p>Choose any one </p><ol><li>Web Technologies </li><li>Mobile Computing </li><li>Intelligent Agents for E-Markets </li></ol><p>Choose any one </p><ol><li>Content Management Systems &amp; Web Analytics </li><li>Big Data (PG) </li><li>Cloud Computing </li><li>Workflow Management Systems </li></ol></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Innovation and Entrepreneurship</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Innovation for New Markets<br/>Innovation, Creativity and Foresight<br/>New Venture Finance<br/>Entrepreneurial Management Capabilities<br/>Innovation through Digital Technology<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Logistics and Supply Chain Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Project Management<br/>Supply Chain Management<br/>Purchasing and Materials Management<br/>Compliance Management<br/>Logistics Processes In Erp<br/>Business Operations and Logistics</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><h3>Managing In The Global Context</h3><h3>Strategic Business Management<br/>Compliance Management</h3><h3>Leading Contemporary Organisations</h3><h3>Innovation, Creativity and Foresight<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship</h3></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Marketing</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Marketing Systems<br/>Buyer Behaviour<br/>Applied Marketing Solutions<br/>Integrated Brand Management<br/>Business Marketing<br/>Strategic Marketing For Managers</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Property</strong> </p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Property Valuation </p><p>Property Finance and Taxation </p><p>Property Feasibility Study </p><p>Property Investment Analysis </p><p>Property Development </p><p>Property Portfolio Analysis </p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Sustainable Business</strong></p><p> (60CP)</p></td><td><p>Creating Sustainable Organisations</p><p>Business, Society and the Environment<br/>Social and Environmental Accounting<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship<br/>Developing Sustainable Places<br/>Innovation, Creativity and Foresight</p></td></tr></table>

**Capstone Units (20CP)**

9. Business Project OR Internship

```markdown
**元智大學資訊管理學系碩士班研究生**

**資訊管理組(國際雙聯學位)　修業規定**

**（107學年度入學新生適用）**

107.05.02 一○六學年度第五次教務會議通過

第一條　本國際雙聯學位研究生最低修業年限為一年半，最長不可超過四年，最低畢業學分為三十學分。本研究生修畢所有相關課業規定並完成碩士論文後，將分別獲得元智大學管理學碩士學位(Master of Science,簡稱MS)與澳洲西雪梨大學MBA (Master of Business & Administration)。

第二條　本學位研究生須具備IELTS (Academic) 6.5 overall score with a minimum 6.0 in each subtest或TOEFL 575(minimum 4.5 in TWE)或TOEFL computer based test 232 (minimum 4.5 in Essay Rating)之程度，並取得澳洲西雪梨大學之入學許可與澳洲政府核發之簽證，方可進入西雪梨大學就讀。

第三條　本學位課程包含必修及選修科目二類，詳如雙聯學位必、選修科目表。

第四條　本學位研究生若因特殊原因無法完成必選修科目表中所列之澳洲西雪梨大學部份課程者，須提出申請，經指導教授及系務會議通過核可後，始得同意其修抵本校替代課程。修畢替代課程並完成碩士論文者，則授予元智大學MS碩士學位。

第五條　本學位研究生新生須於開學後二週內選定課業指導教授，在未選定碩士論文指導教授前，由課業指導教授輔導其選課及一切修課相關事宜。

第六條　本學位研究生之碩士論文指導教授須為本系之專任教授、副教授或助理教授，若指導教授非本系之教師時，則須由課業指導教授推薦，並經系務會議通過後，得選定非本系之教師擔任論文指導教授，但仍須與本系之專任教師一名以上共同指導。

第七條　本學位研究生須於第一學年第二學期結束前二週選定碩士論文指導教授，並至本系完成登錄程序。本系研究生得於碩士論文研究計畫審查前，申請變更論文指導教授，唯須分別經原任與新任指導教授同意，並送請系主任核備。

第八條　本學位研究生經碩士論文指導教授同意後，始得進行碩士論文研究計畫審查。

第九條　本學位研究生所提之碩士論文研究計畫經該生碩士論文指導教授審查通過後，即可依規定程序申請論文口試。研究生上學期須於九月底前，下學期須於三月底前通過碩士論文研究計畫審查，該研究生即可在當學期提出論文口試之申請。通過碩士論文計畫審查二個月以上之碩士候選人，始得進行碩士論文口試。

第十條　本學位研究生需負擔本系安排之助教或研究助理性質之工作。其工作內容包括擔任實驗室值班助教、協助監考、批改作業、考卷、成績統計及輔導大學部同學等工作。

第十一條　本學位研究生須依本校學術研究倫理教育課程實施要點規定，於入學第一學期結束前完成學術研究倫理教育課程，最遲須於申請學位口試前補修完成，未完成本課程，不得申請學位口試。

第十二條　其他本規則未定事宜，悉遵照本校及教育部相關規定辦理。

第十三條　本辦法經系務會議通過，送教務處核備後實施，修正時亦同。
```

<!-- OCR_END -->

105.04.20 一○四學年度第五次教務會議通過

Passed by the 5th Academic Affairs Meeting, Academic Year 2016, on April 20, 2016

**Appendix：** Master of Business and Administration Program Structure

**General Foundation Units (40CP)**

1. The Contemporary Business Environment
2. Business Communication Skills
3. Understanding Contemporary Organisations
4. Integrated Business Experience 1

**Core Units (40CP)**

5. Financial Reports for Decision Making
6. Contemporary People Management
7. Integrated Business Experience 2
8. Economics PG

**Specialist Knowledge Units (60CP)**

<table><tr><td><p><strong>Finance and Investment</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Corporate Finance </p><p>Financial Institutions and Markets (MAF) </p><p>International Finance </p><p>Security Analysis and Portfolio Theory </p><p>Property Investment Analysis </p><p>Property Portfolio Analysis </p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Hospitality and Tourism</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Gastronomy and the Food and Beverage Experience<br/>Facilities and Venue Management<br/>Tourism Management<br/>Event Management<br/>Hospitality and Tourism In Society<br/>Strategic Marketing for Hospitality and Tourism</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Human Resources Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Industrial Relations and Workplace Change<br/>Strategic Employment Relations<br/>Employment Relations Professional Practice<br/>Reward Management</p><p>Developing Human Capital and Organisational Capability<br/>Diversity, Labour Markets and Workforce Planning</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Information and Communications Technology</strong> (60CP)</p></td><td><p>Programming Proficiency </p><p>Advanced Topics in User System Interaction </p><p>Systems Analysis and Database Management Systems </p><p>Network Technologies </p><p>Choose any one </p><ol><li>Web Technologies </li><li>Mobile Computing </li><li>Intelligent Agents for E-Markets </li></ol><p>Choose any one </p><ol><li>Content Management Systems &amp; Web Analytics </li><li>Big Data (PG) </li><li>Cloud Computing </li><li>Workflow Management Systems </li></ol></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Innovation and Entrepreneurship</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Innovation for New Markets<br/>Innovation, Creativity and Foresight<br/>New Venture Finance<br/>Entrepreneurial Management Capabilities<br/>Innovation through Digital Technology<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Logistics and Supply Chain Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Project Management<br/>Supply Chain Management<br/>Purchasing and Materials Management<br/>Compliance Management<br/>Logistics Processes In Erp<br/>Business Operations and Logistics</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><h3>Managing In The Global Context</h3><h3>Strategic Business Management<br/>Compliance Management</h3><h3>Leading Contemporary Organisations</h3><h3>Innovation, Creativity and Foresight<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship</h3></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Marketing</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Marketing Systems<br/>Buyer Behaviour<br/>Applied Marketing Solutions<br/>Integrated Brand Management<br/>Business Marketing<br/>Strategic Marketing For Managers</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Property</strong> </p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Property Valuation </p><p>Property Finance and Taxation </p><p>Property Feasibility Study </p><p>Property Investment Analysis </p><p>Property Development </p><p>Property Portfolio Analysis </p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Sustainable Business</strong></p><p> (60CP)</p></td><td><p>Creating Sustainable Organisations</p><p>Business, Society and the Environment<br/>Social and Environmental Accounting<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship<br/>Developing Sustainable Places<br/>Innovation, Creativity and Foresight</p></td></tr></table>

**Capstone Units (20CP)**

9. Business Project OR Internship
```

year.</p><p>6.研究生須依本校學術研究倫理教育課程實施要點規定，於入學第一學期結束前完成學術研究倫理教育課程，最遲須於申請學位口試前補修完成，未完成本課程，不得申請學位口試。</p><p>For those graduate students who shall complete Academic Research Ethics Education Course before the end of their first academic semester, they must follow the regulations of Yuan Ze University Academic Research Ethics Education Course Implementation Highlights. **元智大學　資訊管理學系碩士班**

**資訊管理組(國際雙聯學位)　必選修科目表**

**Master Program of Information Management Department at Yuan Ze University**

**Information Management Track (International Dual Degree)**

**List of Required and Elective Courses**

**（107學年度入學新生適用Academic Year 2018. Sept.\~）**

107.05.02 一○六學年度第五次教務會議通過

Passed by the 5th Academic Affairs Meeting, Academic Year 2017, on May 2, 2018

**Appendix：** Master of Business and Administration Program Structure

**General Foundation Units (40CP)**

1. The Contemporary Business Environment
2. Business Communication Skills
3. Understanding Contemporary Organisations
4. Integrated Business Experience 1

**Core Units (40CP)**

5. Financial Reports for Decision Making
6. Contemporary People Management
7. Integrated Business Experience 2
8. Economics PG

**Specialist Knowledge Units (60CP)**

<table><tr><td><p><strong>Finance and Investment</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Corporate Finance </p><p>Financial Institutions and Markets (MAF) </p><p>International Finance </p><p>Security Analysis and Portfolio Theory </p><p>Property Investment Analysis </p><p>Property Portfolio Analysis </p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Hospitality and Tourism</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Gastronomy and the Food and Beverage Experience<br/>Facilities and Venue Management<br/>Tourism Management<br/>Event Management<br/>Hospitality and Tourism In Society<br/>Strategic Marketing for Hospitality and Tourism</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Human Resources Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Industrial Relations and Workplace Change<br/>Strategic Employment Relations<br/>Employment Relations Professional Practice<br/>Reward Management</p><p>Developing Human Capital and Organisational Capability<br/>Diversity, Labour Markets and Workforce Planning</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Information and Communications Technology</strong> (60CP)</p></td><td><p>Programming Proficiency </p><p>Advanced Topics in User System Interaction </p><p>Systems Analysis and Database Management Systems </p><p>Network Technologies </p><p>Choose any one </p><ol><li>Web Technologies </li><li>Mobile Computing </li><li>Intelligent Agents for E-Markets </li></ol><p>Choose any one </p><ol><li>Content Management Systems &amp; Web Analytics </li><li>Big Data (PG) </li><li>Cloud Computing </li><li>Workflow Management Systems </li></ol></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Innovation and Entrepreneurship</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Innovation for New Markets<br/>Innovation, Creativity and Foresight<br/>New Venture Finance<br/>Entrepreneurial Management Capabilities<br/>Innovation through Digital Technology<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Logistics and Supply Chain Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Project Management<br/>Supply Chain Management<br/>Purchasing and Materials Management<br/>Compliance Management<br/>Logistics Processes In Erp<br/>Business Operations and Logistics</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><h3>Managing In The Global Context</h3><h3>Strategic Business Management<br/>Compliance Management</h3><h3>Leading Contemporary Organisations</h3><h3>Innovation, Creativity and Foresight<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship</h3></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Marketing</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Marketing Systems<br/>Buyer Behaviour<br/>Applied Marketing Solutions<br/>Integrated Brand Management<br/>Business Marketing<br/>Strategic Marketing For Managers</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Property</strong> </p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Property Valuation </p><p>Property Finance and Taxation </p><p>Property Feasibility Study </p><p>Property Investment Analysis </p><p>Property Development </p><p>Property Portfolio Analysis </p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Sustainable Business</strong></p><p> (60CP)</p></td><td><p>Creating Sustainable Organisations</p><p>Business, Society and the Environment<br/>Social and Environmental Accounting<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship<br/>Developing Sustainable Places<br/>Innovation, Creativity and Foresight</p></td></tr></table>

**Capstone Units (20CP)**

9. Business Project OR Internship

```markdown
**元智大學資訊管理學系碩士班研究生**

**資訊管理組(國際雙聯學位)　修業規定**

**（108學年度入學新生適用）**

108.05.01 一○七學年度第六次教務會議通過

第一條　本國際雙聯學位研究生最低修業年限為一年半，最長不可超過四年，最低畢業學分為四十八學分。本研究生修畢所有相關課業規定並完成碩士論文後，將分別獲得元智大學管理學碩士學位(Master of Science,簡稱MS)與澳洲西雪梨大學MBA (Master of Business & Administration)。

第二條　本學位研究生須具備IELTS (Academic) 6.5 overall score with a minimum 6.0 in each subtest或TOEFL 575(minimum 4.5 in TWE)或TOEFL computer based test 232 (minimum 4.5 in Essay Rating)之程度，並取得澳洲西雪梨大學之入學許可與澳洲政府核發之簽證，方可進入西雪梨大學就讀。

第三條　本學位課程包含必修及選修科目二類，詳如雙聯學位必、選修科目表。

第四條　本學位研究生若因特殊原因無法完成必選修科目表中所列之澳洲西雪梨大學部份課程者，須提出申請，經指導教授及系務會議通過核可後，始得同意其修抵本校替代課程。修畢替代課程並完成碩士論文者，則授予元智大學MS碩士學位。

第五條　本學位研究生新生須於開學後二週內選定課業指導教授，在未選定碩士論文指導教授前，由課業指導教授輔導其選課及一切修課相關事宜。

第六條　本學位研究生之碩士論文指導教授須為本系之專任教授、副教授或助理教授，若指導教授非本系之教師時，則須由課業指導教授推薦，並經系務會議通過後，得選定非本系之教師擔任論文指導教授，但仍須與本系之專任教師一名以上共同指導。

第七條　本學位研究生須於第一學年第二學期結束前二週選定碩士論文指導教授，並至本系完成登錄程序。本系研究生得於碩士論文研究計畫審查前，申請變更論文指導教授，唯須分別經原任與新任指導教授同意，並送請系主任核備。

第八條　本學位研究生經碩士論文指導教授同意後，始得進行碩士論文研究計畫審查。

第九條　本學位研究生所提之碩士論文研究計畫經該生碩士論文指導教授審查通過後，即可依規定程序申請論文口試。研究生上學期須於九月底前，下學期須於三月底前通過碩士論文研究計畫審查，該研究生即可在當學期提出論文口試之申請。通過碩士論文計畫審查二個月以上之碩士候選人，始得進行碩士論文口試。

第十條　本學位研究生需負擔本系安排之助教或研究助理性質之工作。其工作內容包括擔任實驗室值班助教、協助監考、批改作業、考卷、成績統計及輔導大學部同學等工作。

第十一條　本學位研究生須依本校學術研究倫理教育課程實施要點規定，於入學第一學期結束前完成學術研究倫理教育課程，最遲須於申請學位口試前補修完成，未完成本課程，不得申請學位口試。

第十二條　其他本規則未定事宜，悉遵照本校及教育部相關規定辦理。

第十三條　本辦法經系務會議通過，送教務處核備後實施，修正時亦同。
```

<!-- OCR_END -->

- **168. [超連結（檔案）]**: files/COURSES/701IM/105IM-MMtech.docx

**Appendix：** Master of Business and Administration Program Structure

**General Foundation Units (40CP)**

1. The Contemporary Business Environment
2. Business Communication Skills
3. Understanding Contemporary Organisations
4. Integrated Business Experience 1

**Core Units (40CP)**

5. Financial Reports for Decision Making
6. Contemporary People Management
7. Integrated Business Experience 2
8. Economics PG

**Specialist Knowledge Units (60CP)**

<table><tr><td><p><strong>Finance and Investment</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Corporate Finance </p><p>Financial Institutions and Markets (MAF) </p><p>International Finance </p><p>Security Analysis and Portfolio Theory </p><p>Property Investment Analysis </p><p>Property Portfolio Analysis </p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Hospitality and Tourism</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Gastronomy and the Food and Beverage Experience<br/>Facilities and Venue Management<br/>Tourism Management<br/>Event Management<br/>Hospitality and Tourism In Society<br/>Strategic Marketing for Hospitality and Tourism</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Human Resources Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Industrial Relations and Workplace Change<br/>Strategic Employment Relations<br/>Employment Relations Professional Practice<br/>Reward Management</p><p>Developing Human Capital and Organisational Capability<br/>Diversity, Labour Markets and Workforce Planning</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Information and Communications Technology</strong> (60CP)</p></td><td><p>Programming Proficiency </p><p>Advanced Topics in User System Interaction </p><p>Systems Analysis and Database Management Systems </p><p>Network Technologies </p><p>Choose any one </p><ol><li>Web Technologies </li><li>Mobile Computing </li><li>Intelligent Agents for E-Markets </li></ol><p>Choose any one </p><ol><li>Content Management Systems &amp; Web Analytics </li><li>Big Data (PG) </li><li>Cloud Computing </li><li>Workflow Management Systems </li></ol></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Innovation and Entrepreneurship</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Innovation for New Markets<br/>Innovation, Creativity and Foresight<br/>New Venture Finance<br/>Entrepreneurial Management Capabilities<br/>Innovation through Digital Technology<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Logistics and Supply Chain Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Project Management<br/>Supply Chain Management<br/>Purchasing and Materials Management<br/>Compliance Management<br/>Logistics Processes In Erp<br/>Business Operations and Logistics</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><h3>Managing In The Global Context</h3><h3>Strategic Business Management<br/>Compliance Management</h3><h3>Leading Contemporary Organisations</h3><h3>Innovation, Creativity and Foresight<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship</h3></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Marketing</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Marketing Systems<br/>Buyer Behaviour<br/>Applied Marketing Solutions<br/>Integrated Brand Management<br/>Business Marketing<br/>Strategic Marketing For Managers</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Property</strong> </p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Property Valuation </p><p>Property Finance and Taxation </p><p>Property Feasibility Study </p><p>Property Investment Analysis </p><p>Property Development </p><p>Property Portfolio Analysis </p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Sustainable Business</strong></p><p> (60CP)</p></td><td><p>Creating Sustainable Organisations</p><p>Business, Society and the Environment<br/>Social and Environmental Accounting<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship<br/>Developing Sustainable Places<br/>Innovation, Creativity and Foresight</p></td></tr></table>

**Capstone Units (20CP)**

9. Business Project OR Internship

year.</p><p>6.研究生須依本校學術研究倫理教育課程實施要點規定，於入學第一學期結束前完成學術研究倫理教育課程，最遲須於申請學位口試前補修完成，未完成本課程，不得申請學位口試。</p><p>For those graduate students who shall complete Academic Research Ethics Education Course before the end of their first academic semester, they must follow the regulations of Yuan Ze University Academic Research Ethics Education Course Implementation Highlights. **Master Program of Information Management Department at Yuan Ze University**

**Information Management Track (International Dual Degree)**

**List of Required and Elective Courses**

**（108學年度入學新生適用）**

**(Applicable to Students Admitted in Academic Year of 2019)**

107.05.02 一○六學年度第五次教務會議通過

Passed by the 5th Academic Affairs Meeting, Academic Year 2017, on May 2, 2018

**Appendix：** Master of Business and Administration Program Structure

**General Foundation Units (40CP)**

1. The Contemporary Business Environment
2. Business Communication Skills
3. Understanding Contemporary Organisations
4. Integrated Business Experience 1

**Core Units (40CP)**

5. Financial Reports for Decision Making
6. Contemporary People Management
7. Integrated Business Experience 2
8. Economics PG

**Specialist Knowledge Units (60CP)**

<table><tr><td><p><strong>Finance and Investment</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Corporate Finance </p><p>Financial Institutions and Markets (MAF) </p><p>International Finance </p><p>Security Analysis and Portfolio Theory </p><p>Property Investment Analysis </p><p>Property Portfolio Analysis </p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Hospitality and Tourism</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Gastronomy and the Food and Beverage Experience<br/>Facilities and Venue Management<br/>Tourism Management<br/>Event Management<br/>Hospitality and Tourism In Society<br/>Strategic Marketing for Hospitality and Tourism</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Human Resources Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Industrial Relations and Workplace Change<br/>Strategic Employment Relations<br/>Employment Relations Professional Practice<br/>Reward Management</p><p>Developing Human Capital and Organisational Capability<br/>Diversity, Labour Markets and Workforce Planning</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Information and Communications Technology</strong> (60CP)</p></td><td><p>Programming Proficiency </p><p>Advanced Topics in User System Interaction </p><p>Systems Analysis and Database Management Systems </p><p>Network Technologies </p><p>Choose any one </p><ol><li>Web Technologies </li><li>Mobile Computing </li><li>Intelligent Agents for E-Markets </li></ol><p>Choose any one </p><ol><li>Content Management Systems &amp; Web Analytics </li><li>Big Data (PG) </li><li>Cloud Computing </li><li>Workflow Management Systems </li></ol></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Innovation and Entrepreneurship</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Innovation for New Markets<br/>Innovation, Creativity and Foresight<br/>New Venture Finance<br/>Entrepreneurial Management Capabilities<br/>Innovation through Digital Technology<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Logistics and Supply Chain Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Project Management<br/>Supply Chain Management<br/>Purchasing and Materials Management<br/>Compliance Management<br/>Logistics Processes In Erp<br/>Business Operations and Logistics</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><h3>0BManaging In The Global Context</h3><h3>1BStrategic Business Management<br/>Compliance Management</h3><h3>2BLeading Contemporary Organisations</h3><h3>3BInnovation, Creativity and Foresight<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship</h3></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Marketing</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Marketing Systems<br/>Buyer Behaviour<br/>Applied Marketing Solutions<br/>Integrated Brand Management<br/>Business Marketing<br/>Strategic Marketing For Managers</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Property</strong> </p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Property Valuation </p><p>Property Finance and Taxation </p><p>Property Feasibility Study </p><p>Property Investment Analysis </p><p>Property Development </p><p>Property Portfolio Analysis </p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Sustainable Business</strong></p><p> (60CP)</p></td><td><p>Creating Sustainable Organisations</p><p>Business, Society and the Environment<br/>Social and Environmental Accounting<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship<br/>Developing Sustainable Places<br/>Innovation, Creativity and Foresight</p></td></tr></table>

**Capstone Units (20CP)**

9. Business Project OR Internship
```

minimum of 48 credits and complete one master thesis for graduation.</p><p>2.選修課程需於附表-元智大學資訊管理學系碩士班資訊管理組(國際雙聯學位)選修科目表中任選12學分。</p><p>Student must at least take and complete 12 credits out of the elective courses listed in the attached file, named the “Master Program of Information Management Department at Yuan Ze University Information Management Track (International Dual Degree) List of Elective Courses”.</p><p>3.須配合「澳洲西雪梨大學」Quarter制入學修課時間。</p><p>Please make sure that you begin the program in accordance to the Quarter sessions of UWS.</p><p>5.澳洲西雪梨大學之授予學位與修課要求，悉依照入學年度西雪梨大學的規定辦理。</p><p>The awarded degree and course requirements of UWS should follow the rule of admission year.</p><p>6.研究生須依本校學術研究倫理教育課程實施要點規定，於入學第一學期結束前完成學術研究倫理教育課程，最遲須於申請學位口試前補修完成，未完成本課程，不得申請學位口試。</p><p>For those graduate students who shall complete Academic Research Ethics Education Course before the end of their first academic semester, they must follow the regulations of Yuan Ze University Academic Research Ethics Education Course Implementation Highlights. The latest deadline for them shall be their course completions and then their applications towards the degree’s oral exam.</p></td></tr></table>

**資訊管理組(國際雙聯學位)　必選修科目表**

**Master Program of Information Management Department at Yuan Ze University**

**Information Management Track (International Dual Degree)**

**List of Required and Elective Courses**

**（109學年度入學新生適用）**

**(Applicable to Students Admitted in Academic Year of 2020)**

109.05.06 一○八學年度第六次教務會議通過

Passed by the 6th Academic Affairs Meeting, Academic Year 2019, on May 06, 2020

**Appendix：** Master of Business and Administration Program Structure

**General Foundation Units (40CP)**

1. The Contemporary Business Environment
2. Business Communication Skills
3. Understanding Contemporary Organisations
4. Integrated Business Experience 1

**Core Units (40CP)**

5. Financial Reports for Decision Making
6. Contemporary People Management
7. Integrated Business Experience 2
8. Economics PG

**Specialist Knowledge Units (60CP)**

<table><tr><td><p><strong>Finance and Investment</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Corporate Finance </p><p>Financial Institutions and Markets (MAF) </p><p>International Finance </p><p>Security Analysis and Portfolio Theory </p><p>Property Investment Analysis </p><p>Property Portfolio Analysis </p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Hospitality and Tourism</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Gastronomy and the Food and Beverage Experience<br/>Facilities and Venue Management<br/>Tourism Management<br/>Event Management<br/>Hospitality and Tourism In Society<br/>Strategic Marketing for Hospitality and Tourism</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Human Resources Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Industrial Relations and Workplace Change<br/>Strategic Employment Relations<br/>Employment Relations Professional Practice<br/>Reward Management</p><p>Developing Human Capital and Organisational Capability<br/>Diversity, Labour Markets and Workforce Planning</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Information and Communications Technology</strong> (60CP)</p></td><td><p>Programming Proficiency </p><p>Advanced Topics in User System Interaction </p><p>Systems Analysis and Database Management Systems </p><p>Network Technologies </p><p>Choose any one </p><ol><li>Web Technologies </li><li>Mobile Computing </li><li>Intelligent Agents for E-Markets </li></ol><p>Choose any one </p><ol><li>Content Management Systems &amp; Web Analytics </li><li>Big Data (PG) </li><li>Cloud Computing </li><li>Workflow Management Systems </li></ol></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Innovation and Entrepreneurship</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Innovation for New Markets<br/>Innovation, Creativity and Foresight<br/>New Venture Finance<br/>Entrepreneurial Management Capabilities<br/>Innovation through Digital Technology<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Logistics and Supply Chain Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Project Management<br/>Supply Chain Management<br/>Purchasing and Materials Management<br/>Compliance Management<br/>Logistics Processes In Erp<br/>Business Operations and Logistics</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><h3>0BManaging In The Global Context</h3><h3>1BStrategic Business Management<br/>Compliance Management</h3><h3>2BLeading Contemporary Organisations</h3><h3>3BInnovation, Creativity and Foresight<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship</h3></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Marketing</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Marketing Systems<br/>Buyer Behaviour<br/>Applied Marketing Solutions<br/>Integrated Brand Management<br/>Business Marketing<br/>Strategic Marketing For Managers</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Property</strong> </p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Property Valuation </p><p>Property Finance and Taxation </p><p>Property Feasibility Study </p><p>Property Investment Analysis </p><p>Property Development </p><p>Property Portfolio Analysis </p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Sustainable Business</strong></p><p> (60CP)</p></td><td><p>Creating Sustainable Organisations</p><p>Business, Society and the Environment<br/>Social and Environmental Accounting<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship<br/>Developing Sustainable Places<br/>Innovation, Creativity and Foresight</p></td></tr></table>

**Capstone Units (20CP)**

9. Business Project OR Internship
```

minimum of 48 credits and complete one master thesis for graduation.</p><p>2.選修課程需於附表-元智大學資訊管理學系碩士班資訊管理組(國際雙聯學位)選修科目表中任選12學分。</p><p>Student must at least take and complete 12 credits out of the elective courses listed in the attached file, named the “Master Program of Information Management Department at Yuan Ze University Information Management Track (International Dual Degree) List of Elective Courses”.</p><p>3.須配合「澳洲西雪梨大學」Quarter制入學修課時間。</p><p>Please make sure that you begin the program in accordance to the Quarter sessions of UWS.</p><p>4.學生應於元智大學資管系碩士班成功完成第一學期的課程要求，始得向UWS申請。</p><p>Only if students have successfully completed the courses required in the Fall semester can they begin to apply for the course at UWS.</p><p>5.澳洲西雪梨大學之授予學位與修課要求，悉依照入學年度西雪梨大學的規定辦理。</p><p>The awarded degree and course requirements of UWS should follow the rule of admission year.</p><p>6.研究生須依本校學術研究倫理教育課程實施要點規定，於入學第一學期結束前完成學術研究倫理教育課程，最遲須於申請學位口試前補修完成，未完成本課程，不得申請學位口試。</p><p>For those graduate students who shall complete Academic Research Ethics Education Course before the end of their first academic semester, they must follow the regulations of Yuan Ze University Academic Research Ethics Education Course Implementation Highlights. The latest deadline for them shall be their course completions and then their applications towards the degree’s oral exam.</p></td></tr></table>

105.04.20 一○四學年度第五次教務會議通過

Passed by the 5th Academic Affairs Meeting, Academic Year 2016, on April 20, 2016

**Appendix：** Master of Business and Administration Program Structure

**General Foundation Units (40CP)**

1. The Contemporary Business Environment
2. Business Communication Skills
3. Understanding Contemporary Organisations
4. Integrated Business Experience 1

**Core Units (40CP)**

5. Financial Reports for Decision Making
6. Contemporary People Management
7. Integrated Business Experience 2
8. Economics PG

**Specialist Knowledge Units (60CP)**

<table><tr><td><p><strong>Finance and Investment</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Corporate Finance </p><p>Financial Institutions and Markets (MAF) </p><p>International Finance </p><p>Security Analysis and Portfolio Theory </p><p>Property Investment Analysis </p><p>Property Portfolio Analysis </p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Hospitality and Tourism</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Gastronomy and the Food and Beverage Experience<br/>Facilities and Venue Management<br/>Tourism Management<br/>Event Management<br/>Hospitality and Tourism In Society<br/>Strategic Marketing for Hospitality and Tourism</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Human Resources Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Industrial Relations and Workplace Change<br/>Strategic Employment Relations<br/>Employment Relations Professional Practice<br/>Reward Management</p><p>Developing Human Capital and Organisational Capability<br/>Diversity, Labour Markets and Workforce Planning</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Information and Communications Technology</strong> (60CP)</p></td><td><p>Programming Proficiency </p><p>Advanced Topics in User System Interaction </p><p>Systems Analysis and Database Management Systems </p><p>Network Technologies </p><p>Choose any one </p><ol><li>Web Technologies </li><li>Mobile Computing </li><li>Intelligent Agents for E-Markets </li></ol><p>Choose any one </p><ol><li>Content Management Systems &amp; Web Analytics </li><li>Big Data (PG) </li><li>Cloud Computing </li><li>Workflow Management Systems </li></ol></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Innovation and Entrepreneurship</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Innovation for New Markets<br/>Innovation, Creativity and Foresight<br/>New Venture Finance<br/>Entrepreneurial Management Capabilities<br/>Innovation through Digital Technology<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Logistics and Supply Chain Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Project Management<br/>Supply Chain Management<br/>Purchasing and Materials Management<br/>Compliance Management<br/>Logistics Processes In Erp<br/>Business Operations and Logistics</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><h3>Managing In The Global Context</h3><h3>Strategic Business Management<br/>Compliance Management</h3><h3>Leading Contemporary Organisations</h3><h3>Innovation, Creativity and Foresight<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship</h3></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Marketing</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Marketing Systems<br/>Buyer Behaviour<br/>Applied Marketing Solutions<br/>Integrated Brand Management<br/>Business Marketing<br/>Strategic Marketing For Managers</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Property</strong> </p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Property Valuation </p><p>Property Finance and Taxation </p><p>Property Feasibility Study </p><p>Property Investment Analysis </p><p>Property Development </p><p>Property Portfolio Analysis </p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Sustainable Business</strong></p><p> (60CP)</p></td><td><p>Creating Sustainable Organisations</p><p>Business, Society and the Environment<br/>Social and Environmental Accounting<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship<br/>Developing Sustainable Places<br/>Innovation, Creativity and Foresight</p></td></tr></table>

**Capstone Units (20CP)**

9. Business Project OR Internship

minimum of 48 credits and complete one master thesis for graduation.</p><p>2.選修課程需於附表-元智大學資訊管理學系碩士班資訊管理組(國際雙聯學位)選修科目表中任選12學分。</p><p>Student must at least take and complete 12 credits out of the UWS.</p><p>4.學生應於元智大學資管系碩士班成功完成第一學期的課程要求，始得向UWS申請。</p><p>Only if students have successfully completed the courses required in the Fall semester can they begin to apply for the course at UWS.</p><p>5.澳洲西雪梨大學之授予學位與修課要求，悉依照入學年度西雪梨大學的規定辦理。</p><p>The awarded degree and course requirements of UWS should follow the rule of admission year.</p><p>6.研究生須依本校學術研究倫理教育課程實施要點規定，於入學第一學期結束前完成學術研究倫理教育課程，最遲須於申請學位口試前補修完成，未完成本課程，不得申請學位口試。</p><p>For those graduate students who shall complete Academic Research Ethics Education Course before the end of their first academic semester, they must follow the regulations of Yuan Ze University Academic Research Ethics Education Course Implementation Highlights. The latest deadline for them shall be their course completions and then their applications towards the degree’s oral exam.</p></td></tr></table>

**Appendix：** Master of Business and Administration Program Structure

**General Foundation Units (40CP)**

1. The Contemporary Business Environment
2. Business Communication Skills
3. Understanding Contemporary Organisations
4. Integrated Business Experience 1

**Core Units (40CP)**

5. Financial Reports for Decision Making
6. Contemporary People Management
7. Integrated Business Experience 2
8. Economics PG

**Specialist Knowledge Units (60CP)**

<table><tr><td><p><strong>Finance and Investment</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Corporate Finance </p><p>Financial Institutions and Markets (MAF) </p><p>International Finance </p><p>Security Analysis and Portfolio Theory </p><p>Property Investment Analysis </p><p>Property Portfolio Analysis </p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Hospitality and Tourism</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Gastronomy and the Food and Beverage Experience<br/>Facilities and Venue Management<br/>Tourism Management<br/>Event Management<br/>Hospitality and Tourism In Society<br/>Strategic Marketing for Hospitality and Tourism</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Human Resources Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Industrial Relations and Workplace Change<br/>Strategic Employment Relations<br/>Employment Relations Professional Practice<br/>Reward Management</p><p>Developing Human Capital and Organisational Capability<br/>Diversity, Labour Markets and Workforce Planning</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Information and Communications Technology</strong> (60CP)</p></td><td><p>Programming Proficiency </p><p>Advanced Topics in User System Interaction </p><p>Systems Analysis and Database Management Systems </p><p>Network Technologies </p><p>Choose any one </p><ol><li>Web Technologies </li><li>Mobile Computing </li><li>Intelligent Agents for E-Markets </li></ol><p>Choose any one </p><ol><li>Content Management Systems &amp; Web Analytics </li><li>Big Data (PG) </li><li>Cloud Computing </li><li>Workflow Management Systems </li></ol></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Innovation and Entrepreneurship</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Innovation for New Markets<br/>Innovation, Creativity and Foresight<br/>New Venture Finance<br/>Entrepreneurial Management Capabilities<br/>Innovation through Digital Technology<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Logistics and Supply Chain Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Project Management<br/>Supply Chain Management<br/>Purchasing and Materials Management<br/>Compliance Management<br/>Logistics Processes In Erp<br/>Business Operations and Logistics</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Management</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><h3>0BManaging In The Global Context</h3><h3>1BStrategic Business Management<br/>Compliance Management</h3><h3>2BLeading Contemporary Organisations</h3><h3>3BInnovation, Creativity and Foresight<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship</h3></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Marketing</strong></p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Marketing Systems<br/>Buyer Behaviour<br/>Applied Marketing Solutions<br/>Integrated Brand Management<br/>Business Marketing<br/>Strategic Marketing For Managers</p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Property</strong> </p><p>(60CP)</p></td><td><p>Property Valuation </p><p>Property Finance and Taxation </p><p>Property Feasibility Study </p><p>Property Investment Analysis </p><p>Property Development </p><p>Property Portfolio Analysis </p></td></tr><tr><td><p><strong>Sustainable Business</strong></p><p> (60CP)</p></td><td><p>Creating Sustainable Organisations</p><p>Business, Society and the Environment<br/>Social and Environmental Accounting<br/>Governance, Ethics and Social Entrepreneurship<br/>Developing Sustainable Places<br/>Innovation, Creativity and Foresight</p></td></tr></table>

**Capstone Units (20CP)**

9. Business Project OR Internship

**元智大學資訊學院與南昌大學軟件學院雙聯學制**

**資訊管理學系 碩士班 修課計畫**

**（103學年度入學新生適用）**

103.04.09 一○二學年度第六次教務會議通過

103.11.05 一○三學年度第二次教務會議修訂通過

<strong><u>畢業要求：</u></strong>

※修習12學分， 4門課。

‧2門必修課，6學分。

‧1門核心課，3學分。

‧1門選修課，3學分。

‧若入學年度有新開課程，擇採學分抵免方式辦理。

※畢業授予「管理學碩士」(M.S.)學位。

※碩士論文之進行與要求悉依「碩博士共同指導協議書」與「元智大學資管系碩士班修業規定」辦理。

<strong><u>課程架構：</u></strong>

必修課程（2門）

<table><tr><td><p>二上</p></td><td><p>二下</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>碩士論文</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>碩士論文</p><p>（3）</p></td></tr></table>

核心課程（任選1門）

<table><tr><td><p>管理學程</p></td><td><p>資訊科技學程</p></td><td><p>創新學程</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>資訊管理專題</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>計量決策專題</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>資訊產業與管制</p><p>（3）</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>企業管理專題</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>資料庫專題</p><p>（3）</p></td><td></td></tr></table>

選修課程（任選1門）

**元智大學資訊學院與南昌大學軟件學院雙聯學制**

**資訊管理學系 碩士班 修課計畫**

**（104學年度入學新生適用）**

104.04.22 一○三學年度第五次教務會議通過

<strong><u>畢業要求：</u></strong>

※修習12學分， 4門課。

‧2門必修課，6學分。

‧1門核心課，3學分。

‧1門選修課，3學分。

‧若入學年度有新開課程，擇採學分抵免方式辦理。

※畢業授予「管理學碩士」(M.S.)學位。

※碩士論文之進行與要求悉依「碩博士共同指導協議書」與「元智大學資管系碩士班修業規定」辦理。

<strong><u>課程架構：</u></strong>

必修課程（2門）

<table><tr><td><p>二上</p></td><td><p>二下</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>碩士論文</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>碩士論文</p><p>（3）</p></td></tr></table>

‧若入學年度有新開課程，擇採學分抵免方式辦理。

※畢業授予「管理學碩士」(M.S.)學位。

※碩士論文之進行與要求悉依「碩博士共同指導協議書」與「元智大學資管系碩士班修業規定」辦理。

必修課程（2門）

- 關聯類型: 超連結（檔案）
- 本機檔案: admin/aa/files/COURSES/701IM/104IM-M2(all)-1.docx
- OCR Markdown: /mnt/project/cache/ocr_completed_cache/ocr_md_assets/cc8295c18b0a4a0f_104IM-M2_all_-1.md
- OCR 狀態: completed_cached

- 驗證狀態: ok

```markdown
元智大學資訊管理學系碩士在職專班研究生修業規定

資訊管理組、**資訊與社會創新組、大數據商業智慧分析組**

（104學年度入學新生適用）

104.04.22 一○三學年度第五次教務會議通過

第一條　元智大學資訊管理學系碩士在職專班（以下簡稱本專班）師資以資訊學院專、兼任教師與合聘師資聯合組成。

第二條　本專班研究生最低修業年限二年，最低畢業學分為三十學分，並完成碩士論文。

第三條　本專班課程包含必修及選修科目二類，詳如本專班必、選修科目表。

第四條　本專班研究生新生之課業指導教授由本系於開學時排定，並由課業指導教授輔導其選課及一切修課相關事宜。

第五條　本專班研究生之碩士論文指導教授須為本系之專任教授、副教授或助理教授，若非本系之教師時，則須由課業指導教授推薦，並經系務會議通過後，得選定非本系之教師擔任，但仍須與本系之專任教師一名以上共同指導。

第六條　本專班研究生須於第一學年第二學期結束前二週選定碩士論文指導教授，並至本系完成登錄程序。本專班研究生得於碩士論文研究計畫審查前，申請變更碩士論文指導教授，唯需分別經原任與新任指導教授同意，並送請系主任核備。

第七條　本專班研究生須修畢必修科目（不含專題研究一、二及碩士論文）且各科成績均在七十分以上，經碩士論文指導教授提案及系務會議同意後，始得申請碩士論文研究計畫審查。

第八條　本專班研究生所提之碩士論文研究計畫經該生碩士論文指導教授審查通過後，即可依規定程序申請論文口試。未能通過審查之碩士論文研究計畫，至少需間隔一個月以上，始得提出再審。研究生上學期須於十二月十五日前，下學期須於六月十五日前完成碩士論文研究計畫審查通過，否則該研究生不得在次一學期提出論文口試之申請。

第九條　其他本規則未定事宜，悉遵照本校及教育部相關規定辦理。

第十條　本辦法經系務會議通過，送教務處核備後實施，修正時亦同。
```

<!-- OCR_END -->

- **229. [超連結（檔案）]**: files/COURSES/701IM/104IM-M2(all)-1.docx

**元智大學　資訊管理學系碩士班(在職進修專班)**

**資訊管理組　必修科目表**

**（104學年度入學新生適用）**

104.04.22 一○三學年度第五次教務會議通過

<table><tr><td rowspan="2"><p>    學年</p><p>學期</p><p> 科目</p></td><td colspan="2"><p>第一學年</p></td><td colspan="2"><p>第二學年</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>上</p></td><td><p>下</p></td><td><p>上</p></td><td><p>下</p></td></tr><tr><td rowspan="5"><p>必</p><p>修</p><p>科</p><p>目</p><p>（21）</p></td><td><p>資訊管理專題</p><p>（Seminar on Information Management）</p><p>IM520</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>企業研究方法</p><p>（Business Research Methodology）</p><p>IM514</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>專題研究一</p><p>（Applied Project I）</p><p>IM607</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>專題研究二</p><p>（Applied Project II）</p><p>IM608</p><p>（3）</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>計量決策專題</p><p>（Seminar on Quantitative Decision Making）</p><p>IM544</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>企業管理專題</p><p>（Seminar on Business Administration）</p><p>IM518</p><p>（3）</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td></td><td><p>資料庫專題</p><p>（Seminar on Database）</p><p>IM543</p><p>（3）</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>學期</p><p>學分小計</p></td><td><p><strong>6</strong></p></td><td><p><strong>9</strong></p></td><td><p>3</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>備</p><p>註</p></td><td colspan="4"><p>1.畢業最低總學分數為30學分，另加碩士論文一篇。</p><p>2.下列五門科目中至少要選修兩門課：</p><p>資訊管理專題、企業研究方法、計量決策專題、企業管理專題、資料庫專題</p><p>3.在「專業研習、資管新趨勢講座(I)、資管新趨勢講座(II)」三門選修課中，必選二門課修讀，且不計入畢業學分中。</p></td></tr></table>

**大數據商業智慧分析組　必修科目表**

**（104學年度入學新生適用）**

104.04.22 一○三學年度第五次教務會議通過

<table><tr><td rowspan="2"><p>    學年</p><p>學期</p><p> 科目</p></td><td colspan="2"><p>第一學年</p></td><td colspan="2"><p>第二學年</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>上</p></td><td><p>下</p></td><td><p>上</p></td><td><p>下</p></td></tr><tr><td rowspan="5"><p>必</p><p>修</p><p>科</p><p>目</p><p>（18）</p></td><td><p>資訊管理專題</p><p>（Seminar on Information Management）</p><p>IM520</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>企業研究方法</p><p>（Business Research Methodology）</p><p>IM514</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>專題研究一</p><p>（Applied Project I）</p><p>IM607</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>專題研究二</p><p>（Applied Project II）</p><p>IM608</p><p>（3）</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>資料科學導論</p><p>（Introduction to Data Science）</p><p>IM701</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>數據分析</p><p>（Data Analytics）</p><p>IM702</p><p>（3）</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>學期</p><p>學分小計</p></td><td><p><strong>6</strong></p></td><td><p><strong>6</strong></p></td><td><p>3</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>備</p><p>註</p></td><td colspan="4"><p>1.畢業最低總學分數為30學分，另加碩士論文一篇。</p><p>2.下列四門科目中至少要選修兩門課：</p><p>資訊管理專題、企業研究方法、資料科學導論、數據分析。</p><p>3.在「專業研習、資管新趨勢講座(I)、資管新趨勢講座(II)」三門選修課中，必選二門課修讀，且不計入畢業學分中。</p></td></tr></table>

元智大學資訊管理學系碩士在職專班研究生修業規定

資訊管理學程、資訊與社會創新學程、大數據商業智慧分析學程

（105學年度入學新生適用）

105.04.20 一○四學年度第五次教務會議通過

第一條　元智大學資訊管理學系碩士在職專班（以下簡稱本專班）師資以資訊學院專、兼任教師與合聘師資聯合組成。

第二條　本專班研究生最低修業年限二年，最低畢業學分為三十學分，並完成碩士論文。

第三條　本專班課程包含必修及選修科目二類，詳如本專班必、選修科目表。

第四條　本專班研究生新生之課業指導教授由本系於開學時排定，並由課業指導教授輔導其選課及一切修課相關事宜。

第五條　本專班研究生之碩士論文指導教授須為本系之專任教授、副教授或助理教授，若非本系之教師時，則須由課業指導教授推薦，並經系務會議通過後，得選定非本系之教師擔任，但仍須與本系之專任教師一名以上共同指導。

第六條　本專班研究生須於第一學年第二學期結束前二週選定碩士論文指導教授，並至本系完成登錄程序。本專班研究生得於碩士論文研究計畫審查前，申請變更碩士論文指導教授，唯需分別經原任與新任指導教授同意，並送請系主任核備。

第七條　本專班研究生須修畢必修科目（不含專題研究一、二及碩士論文）且各科成績均在七十分以上，經碩士論文指導教授提案及系務會議同意後，始得申請碩士論文研究計畫審查。

第八條　本專班研究生所提之碩士論文研究計畫經該生碩士論文指導教授審查通過後，即可依規定程序申請論文口試。未能通過審查之碩士論文研究計畫，至少需間隔一個月以上，始得提出再審。研究生上學期須於十二月十五日前，下學期須於六月十五日前完成碩士論文研究計畫審查通過，否則該研究生不得在次一學期提出論文口試之申請。

第九條　本專班研究生須依本校學術研究倫理教育課程實施要點規定，於入學第一學期結束前完成學術研究倫理教育課程，最遲須於申請學位口試前補修完成，未完成本課程，不得申請學位口試。

第十條　其他本規則未定事宜，悉遵照本校及教育部相關規定辦理。

第十一條　本辦法經系務會議通過，送教務處核備後實施，修正時亦同。
```

<!-- OCR_END -->

- **232. [超連結（檔案）]**: files/COURSES/701IM/105IM-M2.docx

Passed by the 5th Academic Affairs Meeting, Academic Year 2015, on April 20, 2016

Social Innovation) before first semester starts.</p><p>3.資訊管理學程之研究生，下列五門科目中至少要選修兩門課：</p><p>資訊管理專題、企業研究方法、計量決策專題、企業管理專題、資料庫專題</p><p>Students who chose to participate in Information Management Program must take two of the courses listed below：Seminar on Information Management, Business Research Methodology, Seminar on Quantitative Decision Making, Seminar on Business Administration,and Seminar on Database.</p><p>4.大數據商業智慧分析學程之研究生，下列四門科目中至少要選修兩門課：</p><p>資訊管理專題、企業研究方法、資料科學導論、數據分析。</p><p>Students who chose to participate in Business Intelligence and Data Analytics Program must take two of the courses listed below：Seminar on Information Management, Business Research Methodology, Introduction to Data Science, and Data Analytics.</p><p>5.資訊與社會創新學程之研究生，下列四門科目中至少要選修兩門課：</p><p>資訊管理專題、企業研究方法、資訊與社會創新、資訊產業與管制。</p><p>Students who chose to participate in Information &amp; Social Innovation Program must take two of the courses listed below：Seminar on Information Management, Business Research Methodology, Information and Social Innovation, and Information Industry and Regulation.</p><p>6.研究生須依本校學術研究倫理教育課程實施要點規定，於入學第一學期結束前完成學術研究倫理教育課程，最遲須於申請學位口試前補修完成，未完成本課程，不得申請學位口試。</p><p>For those graduate students who shall complete Academic Research Ethics Education Course before the end of their first academic semester, they must follow the regulations of Yuan Ze University Academic Research Ethics Education Course Implementation Highlights. The latest deadline for them shall be their course completions and then their applications towards the degree’s oral exam.</p></td></tr></table>

```markdown
**元智大學資訊管理學系碩士在職專班研究生修業規定**

**大數據分析學程、資訊管理與創新學程**

（106學年度入學新生適用）

106.04.26 一○五學年度第五次教務會議通過

第一條　元智大學資訊管理學系碩士在職專班（以下簡稱本專班）師資以資訊學院專、兼任教師與合聘師資聯合組成。

第二條　本專班研究生最低修業年限二年，最低畢業學分為三十學分，並完成碩士論文。

第三條　本專班課程包含必修及選修科目二類，詳如本專班必、選修科目表。

第四條　本專班研究生新生之課業指導教授由本系於開學時排定，並由課業指導教授輔導其選課及一切修課相關事宜。

第五條　本專班研究生之碩士論文指導教授須為本系之專任教授、副教授或助理教授，若非本系之教師時，則須由課業指導教授推薦，並經系務會議通過後，得選定非本系之教師擔任，但仍須與本系之專任教師一名以上共同指導。

第六條　本專班研究生須於第一學年第二學期結束前二週選定碩士論文指導教授，並至本系完成登錄程序。本專班研究生得於碩士論文研究計畫審查前，申請變更碩士論文指導教授，唯需分別經原任與新任指導教授同意，並送請系主任核備。

第七條　本專班研究生須修畢必修科目（不含專題研究一、二及碩士論文）且各科成績均在七十分以上，經碩士論文指導教授提案及系務會議同意後，始得申請碩士論文研究計畫審查。

第八條　本專班研究生所提之碩士論文研究計畫經該生碩士論文指導教授審查通過後，即可依規定程序申請論文口試。未能通過審查之碩士論文研究計畫，至少需間隔一個月以上，始得提出再審。研究生上學期須於十二月十五日前，下學期須於六月十五日前完成碩士論文研究計畫審查通過，否則該研究生不得在次一學期提出論文口試之申請。

第九條　本專班研究生須依本校學術研究倫理教育課程實施要點規定，於入學第一學期結束前完成學術研究倫理教育課程，最遲須於申請學位口試前補修完成，未完成本課程，不得申請學位口試。

第十條　其他本規則未定事宜，悉遵照本校及教育部相關規定辦理。

第十一條　本辦法經系務會議通過，送教務處核備後實施，修正時亦同。
```

<!-- OCR_END -->

Passed by the 5th Academic Affairs Meeting, Academic Year 2015, on April 20, 2016

Social Innovation) before first semester starts.</p><p>3.資訊管理學程之研究生，下列五門科目中至少要選修兩門課：</p><p>資訊管理專題、企業研究方法、計量決策專題、企業管理專題、資料庫專題</p><p>Students who chose to participate in Information Management Program must take two of the courses listed below：Seminar on Information Management, Business Research Methodology, Seminar on Quantitative Decision Making, Seminar on Business Administration,and Seminar on Database.</p><p>4.大數據商業智慧分析學程之研究生，下列四門科目中至少要選修兩門課：</p><p>資訊管理專題、企業研究方法、資料科學導論、數據分析。</p><p>Students who chose to participate in Business Intelligence and Data Analytics Program must take two of the courses listed below：Seminar on Information Management, Business Research Methodology, Introduction to Data Science, and Data Analytics.</p><p>5.資訊與社會創新學程之研究生，下列四門科目中至少要選修兩門課：</p><p>資訊管理專題、企業研究方法、資訊與社會創新、資訊產業與管制。</p><p>Students who chose to participate in Information &amp; Social Innovation Program must take two of the courses listed below：Seminar on Information Management, Business Research Methodology, Information and Social Innovation, and Information Industry and Regulation.</p><p>6.研究生須依本校學術研究倫理教育課程實施要點規定，於入學第一學期結束前完成學術研究倫理教育課程，最遲須於申請學位口試前補修完成，未完成本課程，不得申請學位口試。</p><p>For those graduate students who shall complete Academic Research Ethics Education Course before the end of their first academic semester, they must follow the regulations of Yuan Ze University Academic Research Ethics Education Course Implementation Highlights. The latest deadline for them shall be their course completions and then their applications towards the degree’s oral exam.</p></td></tr></table>

**元智大學　資訊管理學系碩士班(在職進修專班)**

**大數據分析學程 必修科目表**

**Master Program of Information Management Department at Yuan Ze University**

**Part-time Data Analytics Track**

**List of Required Courses**

**（106學年度入學新生適用Academic Year 2017. Sept.\~）**

106.04.26 一○五學年度第五次教務會議通過

Passed by the 5th Academic Affairs Meeting, Academic Year 2016, on April 26, 2017

<table><tr><td rowspan="2"><p>     學年Academic Year</p><p>學期Semester</p><p>科目Subject </p></td><td colspan="2"><p>第一學年 1<sup>st</sup> Academic Year</p></td><td colspan="2"><p>第二學年 2<sup>nd</sup> Academic Year</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>上Fall</p></td><td><p>下Spring</p></td><td><p>上Fall</p></td><td><p>下Spring</p></td></tr><tr><td rowspan="5"><p>必</p><p>修</p><p>科</p><p>目</p><p>Compulsory</p><p>（15）</p></td><td><p>資料科學導論</p><p>（Introduction to Data Science）</p><p>IM701</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>數據分析</p><p>（Data Analytics）</p><p>IM702</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>資料科學統整專題一</p><p>（Data Science Capstone Course I）</p><p>IM704</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>資料科學統整專題二</p><p>（Data Science Capstone Course II）</p><p>IM705</p><p>（3）</p></td></tr><tr><td></td><td><p>資料科學專案管理</p><p>（Data Science Project Management）</p><p>IM703</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p> </p></td><td></td></tr><tr><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>學期</p><p>學分小計</p><p>Credits each semester</p></td><td><p>3</p></td><td><p>6</p></td><td><p>3</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>備</p><p>註</p><p>Remarks</p></td><td colspan="4"><p>1.畢業最低總學分數為30學分，另加碩士論文一篇。</p><p>Students must take a minimum of 30 credits and complete one master thesis for graduation.</p><p>2.研究生須於研一上學期開學前自行選定任一學程(大數據分析學程、資訊管理與創新學程)進行修課。</p><p>Postgraduate students must choose any one of the programs (Data Analytics, Information Management &amp; Innovation) before first semester starts.</p><p>3.技術組必修課程為：資料科學導論、數據分析。</p><p>Compulsory courses of the Information Technology Track: Introduction to Data Science, and Data Analytics.</p><p>4.管理組必修課程為：資料科學導論、資料科學專案管理。</p><p>Compulsory courses of the Management Track: Introduction to Data Science, and Data Science Project Management.</p><p>5.研究生須依本校學術研究倫理教育課程實施要點規定，於入學第一學期結束前完成學術研究倫理教育課程，最遲須於申請學位口試前補修完成，未完成本課程，不得申請學位口試。</p><p>For those graduate students who shall complete Academic Research Ethics Education Course before the end of their first academic semester, they must follow the regulations of Yuan Ze University Academic Research Ethics Education Course Implementation Highlights. The latest deadline for them shall be their course completions and then their applications towards the degree’s oral exam.</p></td></tr></table>

106.04.26 一○五學年度第五次教務會議通過

Passed by the 5th Academic Affairs Meeting, Academic Year 2016, on April 26, 2017

<table><tr><td rowspan="2"><p>     學年Academic Year</p><p>學期Semester</p><p>科目Subject </p></td><td colspan="2"><p>第一學年 1<sup>st</sup> Academic Year</p></td><td colspan="2"><p>第二學年 2<sup>nd</sup> Academic Year</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>上Fall</p></td><td><p>下Spring</p></td><td><p>上Fall</p></td><td><p>下Spring</p></td></tr><tr><td rowspan="5"><p>必</p><p>修</p><p>科</p><p>目</p><p>Compulsory</p><p>（27）</p></td><td><p>資訊管理專題</p><p>（Seminar on Information Management）</p><p>IM520</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>企業研究方法</p><p>（Business Research Methodology）</p><p>IM514</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>專題研究一</p><p>（Applied Project I）</p><p>IM607</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>專題研究二</p><p>（Applied Project II）</p><p>IM608</p><p>（3）</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>資訊與社會創新</p><p>（Information and Social Innovation）</p><p>IM803</p><p>(3)</p></td><td><p>資訊產業與管制</p><p>（Information Industry and Regulation）</p><p>IM802</p><p>(3)</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>計量決策專題</p><p>（Seminar on Quantitative Decision Making）</p><p>IM544</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>企業管理專題</p><p>（Seminar on Business Administration）</p><p>IM518</p><p>（3）</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td></td><td><p>資料庫專題</p><p>（Seminar on Database）</p><p>IM543</p><p>（3）</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td></td><td></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>學期</p><p>學分小計</p><p>Credits each semester</p></td><td><p>9</p></td><td><p>12</p></td><td><p>3</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>備</p><p>註</p><p>Remarks</p></td><td colspan="4"><p>1.畢業最低總學分數為30學分，另加碩士論文一篇。</p><p>Students must take a minimum of 30 credits and complete one master thesis for graduation.</p><p>2.研究生須於研一上學期開學前自行選定任一學程(大數據分析學程、資訊管理與創新學程)進行修課。</p><p>Postgraduate students must choose any one of the programs (Data Analytics, Information Management &amp; Innovation) before first semester starts.</p><p>3.資訊管理與創新學程之研究生，下列七門科目中至少要選修兩門課：</p><p>資訊管理專題、企業研究方法、計量決策專題、企業管理專題、資料庫專題、資訊與社會創新、資訊產業與管制。</p><p>Postgraduate students of Information Management &amp; Innovation Track </p><p>Students who chose to participate in Information Management &amp; Innovation Track must take two of the courses listed below：Seminar on Information Management, Business Research Methodology, Seminar on Quantitative Decision Making, Seminar on Business Administration, Seminar on Database, Information and Social Innovation, and Information Industry and Regulation..</p><p>4.研究生須依本校學術研究倫理教育課程實施要點規定，於入學第一學期結束前完成學術研究倫理教育課程，最遲須於申請學位口試前補修完成，未完成本課程，不得申請學位口試。</p><p>For those graduate students who shall complete Academic Research Ethics Education Course before the end of their first academic semester, they must follow the regulations of Yuan Ze University Academic Research Ethics Education Course Implementation Highlights. The latest deadline for them shall be their course completions and then their applications towards the degree’s oral exam.</p></td></tr></table>

**元智大學資訊管理學系碩士在職專班研究生修業規定**

**大數據分析學程、資訊管理與創新學程**

（107學年度入學新生適用）

107.05.02 一○六學年度第五次教務會議通過

第一條　元智大學資訊管理學系碩士在職專班（以下簡稱本專班）師資以資訊學院專、兼任教師與合聘師資聯合組成。

第二條　本專班研究生最低修業年限一年，最低畢業學分為二十四學分，並完成碩士論文。

第三條　本專班課程包含必修及選修科目二類，詳如本專班必、選修科目表。

第四條　本專班研究生新生之課業指導教授由本系於開學時排定，並由課業指導教授輔導其選課及一切修課相關事宜。

第五條　本專班研究生之碩士論文指導教授須為本系之專任教授、副教授或助理教授，若非本系之教師時，則須由課業指導教授推薦，並經系務會議通過後，得選定非本系之教師擔任，但仍須與本系之專任教師一名以上共同指導。

第六條　本專班研究生須於第一學年第二學期結束前二週選定碩士論文指導教授，並至本系完成登錄程序。本專班研究生得於碩士論文研究計畫審查前，申請變更碩士論文指導教授，唯需分別經原任與新任指導教授同意，並送請系主任核備。

第七條　本專班研究生經碩士論文指導教授同意後，始得進行碩士論文研究計畫審查。

第八條　本專班研究生所提之碩士論文研究計畫經該生碩士論文指導教授審查通過後，即可依規定程序申請論文口試。研究生上學期須於九月底前，下學期須於三月底前通過碩士論文研究計畫審查，該研究生即可在當學期提出論文口試之申請。通過碩士論文計畫審查二個月以上之碩士候選人，始得進行碩士論文口試。

第九條　本專班研究生須依本校學術研究倫理教育課程實施要點規定，於入學第一學期結束前完成學術研究倫理教育課程，最遲須於申請學位口試前補修完成，未完成本課程，不得申請學位口試。

第十條　其他本規則未定事宜，悉遵照本校及教育部相關規定辦理。

第十一條　本辦法經系務會議通過，送教務處核備後實施，修正時亦同。
```

<!-- OCR_END -->

**必修科目表**

Passed by the 5th Academic Affairs Meeting, Academic Year 2015, on April 20, 2016

Social Innovation) before first semester starts.</p><p>3.資訊管理學程之研究生，下列五門科目中至少要選修兩門課：</p><p>資訊管理專題、企業研究方法、計量決策專題、企業管理專題、資料庫專題</p><p>Students who chose to participate in Information Management Program must take two of the courses listed below：Seminar on Information Management, Business Research Methodology, Seminar on Quantitative Decision Making, Seminar on Business Administration,and Seminar on Database.</p><p>4.大數據商業智慧分析學程之研究生，下列四門科目中至少要選修兩門課：</p><p>資訊管理專題、企業研究方法、資料科學導論、數據分析。</p><p>Students who chose to participate in Business Intelligence and Data Analytics Program must take two of the courses listed below：Seminar on Information Management, Business Research Methodology, Introduction to Data Science, and Data Analytics.</p><p>5.資訊與社會創新學程之研究生，下列四門科目中至少要選修兩門課：</p><p>資訊管理專題、企業研究方法、資訊與社會創新、資訊產業與管制。</p><p>Students who chose to participate in Information &amp; Social Innovation Program must take two of the courses listed below：Seminar on Information Management, Business Research Methodology, Information and Social Innovation, and Information Industry and Regulation.</p><p>6.研究生須依本校學術研究倫理教育課程實施要點規定，於入學第一學期結束前完成學術研究倫理教育課程，最遲須於申請學位口試前補修完成，未完成本課程，不得申請學位口試。</p><p>For those graduate students who shall complete Academic Research Ethics Education Course before the end of their first academic semester, they must follow the regulations of Yuan Ze University Academic Research Ethics Education Course Implementation Highlights. The latest deadline for them shall be their course completions and then their applications towards the degree’s oral exam.</p></td></tr></table>

semester</p></td><td><p><strong>12</strong></p></td><td><p><strong>18</strong></p></td><td><p>3</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>備</p><p>註</p><p>Remarks</p></td><td colspan="4"><p>1.畢業最低總學分數為24學分，另加碩士論文一篇。</p><p>Students must take a minimum of 24 credits and complete one master thesis for graduation.</p><p>2.研究生須自行選擇任一學程(大數據分析學程或資訊管理與創新學程)進行修課。</p><p>Postgraduate students must choose any one of the programs (Data Analytics , Information Management &amp; Innovation).</p><p>3.大數據分析學程之研究生，下列三門科目中至少要選修兩門課：</p><p>資料科學導論、數據分析、資料科學專案管理。</p><p>Students who chose to participate in Information Management &amp; Innovation Program must take two of the courses listed below：Introduction to Data Science, Data Analytics, and Data Science Project Management.</p><p>4.資訊管理與創新學程之研究生，下列七門科目中至少要選修兩門課：</p><p>資訊管理專題、企業研究方法、計量決策專題、企業管理專題、資料庫專題、資訊與社會創新、資訊產業與管制。</p><p>Postgraduate students of Information Management &amp; Innovation Track </p><p>Students who chose to participate in Information Management &amp; Innovation Track must take two of the courses listed below：Seminar on Information Management, Business Research Methodology, Seminar on Quantitative Decision Making, Seminar on Business Administration, Seminar on Database, Information and Social Innovation, and Information Industry and Regulation..</p><p>5.研究生須依本校學術研究倫理教育課程實施要點規定，於入學第一學期結束前完成學術研究倫理教育課程，最遲須於申請學位口試前補修完成，未完成本課程，不得申請學位口試。</p><p>For those graduate students who shall complete Academic Research Ethics Education Course before the end of their first academic semester, they must follow the regulations of Yuan Ze University Academic Research Ethics Education Course Implementation Highlights. The latest deadline for them shall be their course completions and then their applications towards the degree’s oral exam.</p></td></tr></table>

AA-CP-04-CF03 (1.2版)／101.11.15修訂

- 關聯類型: 超連結（檔案）

- 驗證狀態: ok

```markdown
**元智大學資訊管理學系碩士在職專班研究生修業規定**

**大數據分析學程、資訊管理與創新學程**

（108學年度入學新生適用）

108.05.01 一○七學年度第六次教務會議通過

第一條　元智大學資訊管理學系碩士在職專班（以下簡稱本專班）師資以資訊學院專、兼任教師與合聘師資聯合組成。

第二條　本專班研究生最低修業年限一年，最低畢業學分為二十四學分，並完成碩士論文，選修課程至少有一半學分須修習系上課程，修習非本系之選修課程，須先經指導教授及系主任同意，其它修課抵免未盡事宜，得由系上認定。

第三條　本專班課程包含必修及選修科目二類，詳如本專班必、選修科目表。

第四條　本專班研究生新生之課業指導教授由本系於開學時排定，並由課業指導教授輔導其選課及一切修課相關事宜。

第五條　本專班研究生之碩士論文指導教授須為本系之專任教授、副教授或助理教授，若非本系之教師時，則須由課業指導教授推薦，並經系務會議通過後，得選定非本系之教師擔任，但仍須與本系之專任教師一名以上共同指導。

第六條　本專班研究生須於第一學年第二學期結束前二週選定碩士論文指導教授，並至本系完成登錄程序。本專班研究生得於碩士論文研究計畫審查前，申請變更碩士論文指導教授，唯需分別經原任與新任指導教授同意，並送請系主任核備。

第七條　本專班研究生經碩士論文指導教授同意後，始得進行碩士論文研究計畫審查。

第八條　本專班研究生所提之碩士論文研究計畫經該生碩士論文指導教授審查通過後，即可依規定程序申請論文口試。研究生上學期須於九月底前，下學期須於三月底前通過碩士論文研究計畫審查，該研究生即可在當學期提出論文口試之申請。通過碩士論文計畫審查二個月以上之碩士候選人，始得進行碩士論文口試。

第九條　本專班研究生須依本校學術研究倫理教育課程實施要點規定，於入學第一學期結束前完成學術研究倫理教育課程，最遲須於申請學位口試前補修完成，未完成本課程，不得申請學位口試。

第十條　其他本規則未定事宜，悉遵照本校及教育部相關規定辦理。

第十一條　本辦法經系務會議通過，送教務處核備後實施，修正時亦同。
```

<!-- OCR_END -->

**必修科目表**

**Master Program of Information Management Department at Yuan Ze University (Part-time)**

**List of Required Courses**

**（105學年度入學新生適用Academic Year 2016. Sept.\~）**

105.04.20一○四學年度第五次教務會議通過

Passed by the 5th Academic Affairs Meeting, Academic Year 2015, on April 20, 2016

<table><tr><td rowspan="2"><p>     學年Academic Year</p><p>學期Semester</p><p>科目Subject </p></td><td colspan="2"><p>第一學年 1<sup>st</sup> Academic Year</p></td><td colspan="2"><p>第二學年 2<sup>nd</sup> Academic Year</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>上Fall</p></td><td><p>下Spring</p></td><td><p>上Fall</p></td><td><p>下Spring</p></td></tr><tr><td rowspan="4"><p>必</p><p>修</p><p>科</p><p>目</p><p>Compulsory</p><p>（33）</p></td><td><p>資訊管理專題</p><p>（Seminar on Information Management）</p><p>IM520</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>企業研究方法</p><p>（Business Research Methodology）</p><p>IM514</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>專題研究一</p><p>（Applied Project I）</p><p>IM607</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>專題研究二</p><p>（Applied Project II）</p><p>IM608</p><p>（3）</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>資訊與社會創新</p><p>（Information and Social Innovation）</p><p>IM803</p><p>(3)</p></td><td><p>資訊產業與管制</p><p>（Information Industry and Regulation）</p><p>IM802</p><p>(3)</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>資料科學導論</p><p>（Introduction to Data Science）</p><p>IM701</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>數據分析</p><p>（Data Analytics）</p><p>IM702</p><p>（3）</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>計量決策專題</p><p>（Seminar on Quantitative Decision Making）</p><p>IM544</p><p>（3）</p></td><td><p>企業管理專題</p><p>（Seminar on Business Administration）</p><p>IM518</p><p>（3）</p></td><td></td><td></td></tr><tr><td><p>學期</p><p>學分小計</p><p>Credits each semester</p></td><td><p><strong>12</strong></p></td><td><p><strong>15</strong></p></td><td><p>3</p></td><td><p>3</p></td></tr><tr><td><p>備</p><p>註</p><p>Remarks</p></td><td colspan="4"><p>1.畢業最低總學分數為30學分，另加碩士論文一篇。</p><p>Students must take a minimum of 30 credits and complete one master thesis for graduation.</p><p>2.研究生須於研一上學期開學前自行選定任一學程(資訊管理學程、大數據商業智慧分析學程、資訊與社會創新學程)進行修課。</p><p>Postgraduate students must choose any one of the programs (Information Management, Business Intelligence and Data Analytics, Information &amp; Social Innovation) before first semester starts.</p><p>3.資訊管理學程之研究生，下列五門科目中至少要選修兩門課：</p><p>資訊管理專題、企業研究方法、計量決策專題、企業管理專題、資料庫專題</p><p>Students who chose to participate in Information Management Program must take two of the courses listed below：Seminar on Information Management, Business Research Methodology, Seminar on Quantitative Decision Making, Seminar on Business Administration,and Seminar on Database.</p><p>4.大數據商業智慧分析學程之研究生，下列四門科目中至少要選修兩門課：</p><p>資訊管理專題、企業研究方法、資料科學導論、數據分析。</p><p>Students who chose to participate in Business Intelligence and Data Analytics Program must take two of the courses listed below：Seminar on Information Management, Business Research Methodology, Introduction to Data Science, and Data Analytics.</p><p>5.資訊與社會創新學程之研究生，下列四門科目中至少要選修兩門課：</p><p>資訊管理專題、企業研究方法、資訊與社會創新、資訊產業與管制。</p><p>Students who chose to participate in Information &amp; Social Innovation Program must take two of the courses listed below：Seminar on Information Management, Business Research Methodology, Information and Social Innovation, and Information Industry and Regulation.</p><p>6.研究生須依本校學術研究倫理教育課程實施要點規定，於入學第一學期結束前完成學術研究倫理教育課程，最遲須於申請學位口試前補修完成，未完成本課程，不得申請學位口試。</p><p>For those graduate students who shall complete Academic Research Ethics Education Course before the end of their first academic semester, they must follow the regulations of Yuan Ze University Academic Research Ethics Education Course Implementation Highlights. The latest deadline for them shall be their course completions and then their applications towards the degree’s oral exam.</p></td></tr></table>
